items.title: The UK IPO issues new Designs Practice Notice
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局发布数字外观设计审查新指南
items.title_en: UK IPO Issues New Guidance on Protecting Digital Designs and GUIs
items.summary: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has issued new guidance on protecting digital designs, including graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages and graphic symbols/icons.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UK IPO）发布首份2024年外观设计实践通知（DPN 01/26），旨在澄清图形用户界面、网页及图标等数字外观设计的审查标准。鉴于此类申请量上升，新规强调注册簿需清晰无歧义地展示设计整体印象。指南详细规定了静态与动态设计的提交要求，允许使用最多12个视图展示动画序列，并明确了书面免责声明在界定保护范围时的作用，若解释过于复杂可能引发异议。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26, providing immediate guidance on registering digital designs such as graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages, and icons. This is the first DPN issued since 2024, addressing a rise in applications for these assets. The notice clarifies that the register must clearly show the design's overall impression without ambiguity. It details examination standards for static and moving designs, permitting up to 12 views to depict animation sequences. The guidance also outlines acceptable practices for written disclaimers, emphasizing clarity to avoid objections based on complex interpretation requirements.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国时，应严格遵循新指南优化GUI及UI设计的外观专利申请策略。建议充分利用12个视图上限完整呈现动态交互效果，确保视觉表达清晰无歧义。同时，谨慎使用免责声明，避免因表述模糊导致审查异议，以保障数字资产在英国市场的知识产权保护强度与稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This practice notice provides essential clarity for rights holders managing portfolios of digital assets in the UK market. By specifying how static and dynamic interfaces should be represented, the UK IPO aims to reduce uncertainty during examination. Practitioners should ensure that visual representations and any accompanying disclaimers align strictly with these new standards to maintain robust protection for GUIs and interactive elements.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UK IPO发布DPN 01/26，明确GUI及数字外观设计的审查原则与整体印象标准", "规范动态设计提交，允许使用最多12个视图清晰展示动画 progression", "确认书面免责声明的效力，但要求清晰易懂，避免过度复杂的解释需求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DPN 01/26 establishes key principles for digital design registration, requiring the overall impression to be clear and unambiguous on the register.", "Applicants may use up to 12 views within the online form to accurately represent the progression of animations and moving designs.", "Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear; excessive complexity in interpretation may trigger objections."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI专利视图提交策略，利用多视图清晰呈现动态交互细节", "审慎使用免责声明，确保界定清晰以避免因解释复杂引发的审查异议"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Clarifies registration standards for digital assets like GUIs and icons, helping companies secure clearer protection for interactive interfaces in the UK.", "Practice note: Utilize the maximum of 12 views to demonstrate animation sequences clearly and ensure disclaimers are straightforward to avoid examination objections.", "What to monitor: Observe how examiners apply the 'overall impression' standard to complex digital designs under this new immediate-effect guidance."]
core_points_en: DPN 01/26 establishes key principles for digital design registration, requiring the overall impression to be clear and unambiguous on the register.
Applicants may use up to 12 views within the online form to accurately represent the progression of animations and moving designs.
Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear; excessive complexity in interpretation may trigger objections.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies registration standards for digital assets like GUIs and icons, helping companies secure clearer protection for interactive interfaces in the UK.
Practice note: Utilize the maximum of 12 views to demonstrate animation sequences clearly and ensure disclaimers are straightforward to avoid examination objections.
What to monitor: Observe how examiners apply the 'overall impression' standard to complex digital designs under this new immediate-effect guidance.

items.title: Hamburg Local Division clarifies universal jurisdiction under Art. 4 Brussels I Recast
items.title_zh: UPC 汉堡分部澄清布鲁塞尔条例下的普遍管辖权
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg Confirms Universal Jurisdiction Under Brussels I Recast for Non-UPC Acts
items.summary: Dyson v Dreame – Hamburg Local Division, 7 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 汉堡分部在戴森诉追觅案中裁定，对住所地在成员国的被告拥有普遍管辖权，涵盖西班牙等非 UPC 区及英国侵权。但法院限制了共同被告管辖权，认为欧盟授权代表不足以作为锚定被告追究英国分销商责任，最终驳回针对英国的禁令请求。
items.ai_summary_en: In Dyson v Dreame, the UPC Hamburg Local Division granted a preliminary injunction for EP 3 119 235, confirming that the UPC exercises universal jurisdiction under Article 4 of the Brussels I Recast Regulation over defendants domiciled in UPC Member States. This jurisdiction extends to infringements occurring in non-UPC territories, including Spain and the United Kingdom. However, the Court significantly restricted the application of Article 8(1) regarding co-defendants. It ruled that an EU authorized representative could not serve as an anchor defendant for a UK distributor, as the regulatory framework did not establish sufficient foreseeability for joint liability. Consequently, while relief was granted for UPC states and Spain, claims concerning the UK were dismissed.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕 UPC 普遍管辖权带来的跨境诉讼风险，即便在非 UPC 国家也可能被卷入。同时，单纯设立欧盟代表处未必能覆盖英国法律责任，应针对英欧市场分别构建合规与抗辩体系，避免管辖连接点误判。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the extraterritorial reach of the UPC for rights holders seeking pan-European enforcement, particularly against entities with a domicile in a participating Member State. It simultaneously establishes important boundaries for joinder strategies, indicating that mere regulatory compliance roles in the EU do not automatically create jurisdictional links for distinct UK market activities. Parties must carefully structure their European and UK distribution entities to manage litigation exposure and ensure that jurisdictional anchors are legally robust and factually distinct across these markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["确认 UPC 对成员国被告拥有涵盖非 UPC 领土的普遍管辖权", "限制共同被告管辖权，要求侵权行为关联具有合理可预见性", "欧盟授权代表角色不足以构成英国法下的共同侵权或中间人责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC qualifies as a court of a Member State, applying Article 4 Brussels I Recast to grant universal jurisdiction over defendants domiciled in Contracting Member States.", "Jurisdiction covers infringement acts in non-UPC territories like Spain and the UK when the defendant is domiciled within the UPC system, treating it as a single territory.", "Article 8(1) co-defendant jurisdiction requires reasonably foreseeable connections; an EU authorized representative cannot anchor claims against a separate UK distributor."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用普遍管辖权规则评估在欧整体诉讼风险敞口", "区分英欧法律主体角色，避免单一架构导致责任落空"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage universal jurisdiction against UPC-domiciled defendants for acts in non-UPC states, expanding enforcement scope beyond the UPCA terri…", "Practice note: When joining co-defendants under Article 8(1), ensure factual connections are reasonably foreseeable; regulatory roles alone may not suffice for cross-border liabil…", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretations of 'foreseeability' in co-defendant scenarios, particularly regarding the separation of EU and UK supply chain entities."]
core_points_en: The UPC qualifies as a court of a Member State, applying Article 4 Brussels I Recast to grant universal jurisdiction over defendants domiciled in Contracting Member States.
Jurisdiction covers infringement acts in non-UPC territories like Spain and the UK when the defendant is domiciled within the UPC system, treating it as a single territory.
Article 8(1) co-defendant jurisdiction requires reasonably foreseeable connections; an EU authorized representative cannot anchor claims against a separate UK distributor.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage universal jurisdiction against UPC-domiciled defendants for acts in non-UPC states, expanding enforcement scope beyond the UPCA terri…
Practice note: When joining co-defendants under Article 8(1), ensure factual connections are reasonably foreseeable; regulatory roles alone may not suffice for cross-border liabil…
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretations of 'foreseeability' in co-defendant scenarios, particularly regarding the separation of EU and UK supply chain entities.

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, April 10, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1110/2025 And UPC_CFI_1111/2025
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院：初审判决被推翻后已付费用可追回
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Costs Paid Under Overturned First-Instance Decision Are Recoverable
items.summary: Costs paid under a first-instance decision are recoverable if that decision is overturned on appeal. The appeal’s outcome invalidates the initial cost order (Rule 151 RoP).
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Seoul Viosys案中裁定，若初审判决在上诉中被推翻，依据程序规则第151条，基于该判决产生的初始费用命令失效，已支付费用可在后续程序中追回。法院明确指出，初审阶段达成的费用协议不自动延伸至上诉阶段，因为上诉成本需单独评估其合理性与比例性。此裁决明确了UPC诉讼中费用承担的法律基础随主判决变动而变动的原则，对当事人管理诉讼预算及风险评估具有重要指导意义。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf ruled that costs paid pursuant to a first-instance decision are recoverable if that decision is subsequently overturned on appeal. The Court held that the reversal of the main judgment removes the legal basis for the initial cost order under Rule 151 of the Rules of Procedure. Consequently, amounts previously paid become subject to recovery in subsequent cost proceedings. Additionally, the Court determined that a cost agreement concluded for the first instance does not automatically extend to the appeal stage. Appeal costs must be assessed separately based on reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 of the UPCA, as the original agreement relied on first-instance estimates where an appeal was not foreseeable.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在参与UPC诉讼时，应严格区分初审与上诉阶段的费用预算，避免默认费用协议覆盖全程。鉴于败诉方可能通过上诉逆转费用责任，企业需动态调整诉讼策略，并在和解谈判中明确费用条款的适用范围，以控制跨境知识产权纠纷的整体财务风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the temporal scope of cost orders and agreements within UPC litigation. Rights holders and defendants should recognize that financial obligations arising from first-instance rulings are contingent on the final outcome of any appeals. Cost settlements or agreements negotiated at the trial level do not inherently cover appellate stages, necessitating distinct budgeting and strategic planning for potential appeals to manage exposure effectively.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["初审判决被上诉推翻后，原费用命令失效，已付费用具备可追回性", "初审费用协议不自动涵盖上诉阶段，上诉费用需单独评估合理性", "法律依据为《统一专利法院协定》第69条及程序规则第151条"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Reversal of a first-instance decision invalidates the initial cost order, making previously paid costs recoverable under Rule 151 RoP.", "A cost agreement for the first instance does not automatically apply to appeal proceedings, which require separate assessment.", "Appeal costs are evaluated independently for reasonableness and proportionality pursuant to Article 69 UPCA."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格区分初审与上诉费用预算，避免协议范围误判", "动态调整策略，关注上诉对费用责任的逆转影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Initial cost payments may be reclaimed if the underlying judgment is reversed, affecting overall litigation financial risk.", "Practice note: Draft cost agreements specifically for the first instance; do not assume they cover subsequent appeal stages.", "What to monitor: How separate assessments of reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 UPCA are applied to appeal costs."]
core_points_en: Reversal of a first-instance decision invalidates the initial cost order, making previously paid costs recoverable under Rule 151 RoP.
A cost agreement for the first instance does not automatically apply to appeal proceedings, which require separate assessment.
Appeal costs are evaluated independently for reasonableness and proportionality pursuant to Article 69 UPCA.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Initial cost payments may be reclaimed if the underlying judgment is reversed, affecting overall litigation financial risk.
Practice note: Draft cost agreements specifically for the first instance; do not assume they cover subsequent appeal stages.
What to monitor: How separate assessments of reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 UPCA are applied to appeal costs.

items.title: UPC: Revocation of Independent Claims Does Not Invalidate Unchallenged Claims | Emporia v Seoul Viosys | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC：撤销独立权利要求不自动导致未受挑战的从属权利要求无效
items.title_en: UPC: Revocation of Independent Claim Does Not Automatically Invalidate Unchallenged Dependent Claims
items.summary: The UPC Central Division clarifies that revoking an independent patent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims, highlighting important strategic considerations in revocation actions.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 中央分部在 Emporia 诉 Seoul Viosys 案中裁定，撤销专利的独立权利要求并不自动使未受挑战的从属权利要求无效。法院指出，从属权利要求的附加技术特征可能具备独立权利要求所缺乏的新颖性或创造性。即便独立权利要求因增加事项被撤销，专利权人仍可通过修改将从属权利要求提升为独立形式以维持专利部分有效。
items.ai_summary_en: In Emporia UK and Ireland Ltd. v Seoul Viosys Co., Ltd., the UPC Paris Central Division ruled that revoking an independent patent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims. The court rejected a preliminary objection regarding competence, distinguishing the parties from parallel Court of Appeal proceedings where only specific claims were revoked. The Division held that dependent claims contain additional technical features that may independently satisfy novelty and inventive step requirements. Consequently, the invalidation of the sole independent claim did not extend to dependent claims outside the scope of the earlier dispute, allowing the patent to potentially remain valid in part.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the structural independence of patent claims within UPC revocation actions. Rights holders can preserve partial patent validity by relying on the distinct technical contributions of dependent claims, even if the broadest independent claim is invalidated. This underscores the importance of precise claim construction and the strategic management of parallel proceedings across different jurisdictions to avoid unintended collateral effects on unchallenged claim sets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["独立权利要求撤销不自动波及未受挑战的从属权利要求", "从属权利要求的附加特征可单独满足新颖性与创造性要求", "专利权人需主动申请修改以将从属权利要求转为独立形式"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Paris Central Division confirmed that revocation of an independent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims.", "Dependent claims possess additional technical features that may independently meet novelty and inventive step requirements separate from the independent claim.", "A preliminary objection based on parallel national proceedings was rejected because the parties involved were not considered identical under Article 33(4) UPCA."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["独立权利要求失效不等于专利整体无效，需重点防御从属权利要求", "应及时启动权利要求修改程序，将有效从属权利要求升格为独立权利要求"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Patent owners should assess the standalone validity of dependent claims when facing revocation of independent claims to maintain partial protection.", "Practice note: Ensure clear distinction between parties in parallel national and UPC proceedings to manage competence objections and scope of dispute effectively.", "What to monitor: How the UPC applies this principle to auxiliary requests and whether similar logic applies to infringement counterclaims involving partially revoked patents."]
core_points_en: The UPC Paris Central Division confirmed that revocation of an independent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims.
Dependent claims possess additional technical features that may independently meet novelty and inventive step requirements separate from the independent claim.
A preliminary objection based on parallel national proceedings was rejected because the parties involved were not considered identical under Article 33(4) UPCA.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent owners should assess the standalone validity of dependent claims when facing revocation of independent claims to maintain partial protection.
Practice note: Ensure clear distinction between parties in parallel national and UPC proceedings to manage competence objections and scope of dispute effectively.
What to monitor: How the UPC applies this principle to auxiliary requests and whether similar logic applies to infringement counterclaims involving partially revoked patents.

items.title: Modular IP Education Framework marks three years of growing impact
items.title_zh: EPO模块化IP教育框架实施三年影响显著
items.title_en: EPO Modular IP Education Framework Reaches Three-Year Milestone with Expanded University Network
items.summary: An exchange on insights, best practices and shared values to advance gender parity in innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布其模块化知识产权教育框架（MIPEF）实施三年来成效显著。该框架旨在将IP教育融入STEM学科，已覆盖31个EPC缔约国的100多所大学，惠及6500多名学生并颁发2500多份证书。通过提供结构化、灵活的课程，MIPEF填补了高等教育中技术学科IP教育的空白，助力培养具备专利知识的下一代创新者，促进欧洲创新文化发展。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) reports that its Modular IP Education Framework (MIPEF) has engaged over 6,500 students and issued more than 2,500 certifications since its 2023 launch. The programme now includes over 100 partner universities across 31 European Patent Convention contracting states. MIPEF integrates practical IP training into science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) curricula through ready-to-use courses developed with IP experts. Participants receive EPO certificates and, at the university's discretion, European Credit Transfer and Accumulation System (ECTS) credits. This initiative aims to democratize access to IP knowledge, equipping future inventors and entrepreneurs with essential skills for an innovation-driven economy while modernizing higher education offerings in technical disciplines.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For European and US companies operating in R-intensive sectors, the expansion of MIPEF signals a shift toward early-stage IP literacy among technical talent. As universities increasingly integrate patent rights and IP management into STEM degrees, the baseline competency of new graduates entering the workforce is rising. This trend supports stronger internal IP cultures within organizations and may reduce the initial training burden for in-house counsel and IP teams. Rights holders should recognize this evolving educational landscape as a resource for building long-term innovation capacity and enhancing compliance with European IP standards.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["MIPEF覆盖31国百所高校，认证超2500人，深化STEM领域IP教育", "提供灵活课程填补高校技术学科IP教育空白，无需额外培训结构", "获证学生可得EPO证书及ECTS学分，赋能未来发明人与创业者"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["MIPEF has expanded to over 100 partner universities in 31 EPC contracting states, engaging more than 6,500 students and awarding over 2,500 certifications.", "The framework embeds structured, flexible IP education into STEM disciplines using ready-to-use courses, addressing a critical gap in technical higher education.", "Students completing MIPEF courses receive EPO certificates and potential ECTS credits, fostering a culture of innovation and entrepreneurial awareness across Europe."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借鉴MIPEF模式强化内部IP培训，提升研发团队专利实务能力", "关注欧洲高校IP教育动态，探索校企合作以获取优质IP人才资源"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor the growing pool of STEM graduates with formal IP training, who may require less foundational instruction on patent basics upon hiring.", "Practice note: Consider collaborating with partner universities or leveraging MIPEF resources to align internal R&D training with emerging academic standards.", "What to monitor: Track the expansion of MIPEF participation rates and course content updates to anticipate shifts in graduate IP competencies across key European markets."]
core_points_en: MIPEF has expanded to over 100 partner universities in 31 EPC contracting states, engaging more than 6,500 students and awarding over 2,500 certifications.
The framework embeds structured, flexible IP education into STEM disciplines using ready-to-use courses, addressing a critical gap in technical higher education.
Students completing MIPEF courses receive EPO certificates and potential ECTS credits, fostering a culture of innovation and entrepreneurial awareness across Europe.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor the growing pool of STEM graduates with formal IP training, who may require less foundational instruction on patent basics upon hiring.
Practice note: Consider collaborating with partner universities or leveraging MIPEF resources to align internal R&D training with emerging academic standards.
What to monitor: Track the expansion of MIPEF participation rates and course content updates to anticipate shifts in graduate IP competencies across key European markets.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-769/22 Commission v Hungary (Values of the European Union)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定匈牙利LGBTI+相关法律违反欧盟法及GDPR
items.title_en: CJEU Rules Hungary Breaches EU Law and GDPR via LGBTI+ Content Restrictions
items.summary: Values of the European Union: by adopting a law which stigmatises and marginalises LGBTI+ persons, Hungary has acted in breach of EU law
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在委员会诉匈牙利案中裁定，匈牙利2021年修订的《儿童保护法》因污名化LGBTI+群体而违反欧盟法。法院首次认定成员国侵犯《欧盟条约》第2条价值观，并指出该法违反内部市场服务自由、《欧盟基本权利宪章》及《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）。判决要求匈牙利停止限制涉及性别认同或同性恋内容的传播，确立了欧盟价值观与数据权利在成员国立法中的优先地位。
items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union ruled in Case C-769/22 that Hungary violated EU law by adopting legislation restricting content related to homosexuality and gender reassignment. The Court found infringements of internal market services rules, the Charter of Fundamental Rights, Article 2 TEU, and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This marks the first time the Court has established an infringement of Article 2 TEU values in an action against a Member State. The judgment underscores the primacy of EU fundamental rights and data protection standards over national legislative measures affecting content access and advertising sectors within the Union.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需高度关注欧盟“价值观合规”趋势。除传统IP外，广告与内容营销若涉及性别议题，可能触发GDPR及基本权利诉讼风险。建议审查欧洲区内容策略，确保符合反歧视标准，避免因政治正确问题导致服务受限或品牌声誉受损。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment significantly expands the scope of EU value enforcement, linking fundamental rights directly to internal market regulations and data protection compliance. For rights holders and content providers operating in Europe, it signals heightened scrutiny of national laws that may restrict access to information or discriminate based on identity. Companies must ensure their content strategies and data practices align with non-discrimination principles and GDPR requirements to mitigate regulatory risks across member states.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟法院首次认定成员国立法侵犯《欧盟条约》第2条确立的欧盟价值观", "匈牙利法律因限制LGBTI+内容被裁定违反内部市场服务自由及GDPR规定", "判决强调欧盟基本权利宪章对成员国立法具有直接约束力，需保障非歧视原则"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The CJEU found Hungary breached Article 2 TEU for the first time, establishing that national laws stigmatizing LGBTI+ persons violate foundational EU values.", "The contested law restricting content on gender identity and homosexuality was ruled incompatible with internal market service freedoms and the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights.", "The Court determined that Hungary's legislative amendments also constituted violations of the General Data Protection Regulation regarding data processing and privacy rights."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕欧盟以基本权利和GDPR为由的内容监管风险，审查营销素材", "确保在欧洲市场的服务提供符合非歧视原则，避免触犯欧盟价值观底线"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Content providers and advertisers must review compliance with EU non-discrimination standards and GDPR when operating in member states with restrictive content l…", "Practice note: Monitor how Article 2 TEU violations are increasingly cited alongside secondary law breaches in enforcement actions affecting digital services and media.", "What to monitor: Future litigation challenging national measures that restrict access to content or services based on protected characteristics under EU fundamental rights framewo…"]
core_points_en: The CJEU found Hungary breached Article 2 TEU for the first time, establishing that national laws stigmatizing LGBTI+ persons violate foundational EU values.
The contested law restricting content on gender identity and homosexuality was ruled incompatible with internal market service freedoms and the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights.
The Court determined that Hungary's legislative amendments also constituted violations of the General Data Protection Regulation regarding data processing and privacy rights.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Content providers and advertisers must review compliance with EU non-discrimination standards and GDPR when operating in member states with restrictive content l…
Practice note: Monitor how Article 2 TEU violations are increasingly cited alongside secondary law breaches in enforcement actions affecting digital services and media.
What to monitor: Future litigation challenging national measures that restrict access to content or services based on protected characteristics under EU fundamental rights framewo…

items.title: UPC Ruling Defines The Limits Of Unitary Patent Protection
items.title_zh: UPC 裁决界定单一专利保护的适用极限
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Strict Territorial Scope for Unitary Patent Effect
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court system offers streamlined patent protection across multiple European jurisdictions, but understanding its mechanisms and strategic implications remains crucial for rights holders.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院确认，欧洲专利若要在所有参与成员国获得单一效力，必须在各国拥有完全相同的权利要求集。因马耳他于申请日后才加入欧洲专利公约，导致涉案专利无法覆盖该国，故被驳回单一效力请求。法院坚持严格解释法规，拒绝因地域缺失非权利人可控而给予灵活性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal has confirmed that a European patent qualifies for unitary effect only if it covers all participating member states with an identical set of claims. In case UPC_CoA_8/2026, the Court upheld the European Patent Office's refusal to grant unitary effect where the patent did not cover Malta. Because Malta was not a party to the European Patent Convention at the application's filing date in 2005, it could not be designated. The Court rejected arguments for flexibility regarding circumstances beyond the proprietor's control, establishing that strict territorial coverage is a mandatory condition for unitary protection.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请专利时，需严格核查目标国在优先权日或申请日的公约成员状态。对于涉及新加入成员国的分案申请，应评估单一专利路径的可行性，避免因部分国家缺失导致整体单一效力失效，必要时考虑传统生效模式。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling establishes a rigid boundary for unitary patent eligibility, impacting portfolio strategies for rights holders with older priority dates or complex divisional histories. It underscores that the unitary system does not accommodate historical gaps in EPC membership, requiring precise alignment between the patent's territorial scope and the current list of participating states at the time of request.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单一效力要求专利在所有参与国具有完全相同的权利要求集", "申请日前未加入公约的成员国（如马耳他）导致无法获得单一保护", "UPC 上诉院拒绝因客观情况排除领土而放宽单一效力的法定条件"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Unitary effect requires a European patent to cover all participating member states with an identical set of claims in each jurisdiction.", "Patents filed before a country's accession to the EPC cannot include that state, potentially disqualifying them from unitary protection.", "The UPC Court of Appeal refused to allow flexibility for missing territories caused by historical accession dates or procedural constraints."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["核查申请日各国公约状态，避免因地域缺失丧失单一效力", "针对特定国家缺口，提前规划传统验证与单一专利的组合策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders must verify whether all participating UPC states were EPC members on the relevant filing date to ensure unitary eligibility.", "Practice note: For divisional applications or patents with early priority dates, assess if historical non-membership of specific states precludes unitary effect.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'identical claims' and potential legislative adjustments regarding transitional cases involving new EPC members."]
core_points_en: Unitary effect requires a European patent to cover all participating member states with an identical set of claims in each jurisdiction.
Patents filed before a country's accession to the EPC cannot include that state, potentially disqualifying them from unitary protection.
The UPC Court of Appeal refused to allow flexibility for missing territories caused by historical accession dates or procedural constraints.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must verify whether all participating UPC states were EPC members on the relevant filing date to ensure unitary eligibility.
Practice note: For divisional applications or patents with early priority dates, assess if historical non-membership of specific states precludes unitary effect.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'identical claims' and potential legislative adjustments regarding transitional cases involving new EPC members.

items.title: There is no global patent, but a PCT international application can be useful
items.title_zh: 不存在全球专利，但 PCT 国际申请极具价值
items.title_en: No Global Patent Exists, But PCT International Applications Offer Strategic Value
items.summary: There is no global patent that covers the world, but a PCT international patent application can be useful. Discover the benefits of the PCT route.
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章澄清不存在覆盖全球的“世界专利”，专利权具有地域性。PCT 体系允许申请人通过单一语言、单一局提交申请，在 158 个缔约国保留权利，并延长进入国家阶段的时间至 30-31 个月。该机制虽不直接授予专利，但能优化多国布局的成本与决策流程，适合目标市场尚不明确的情况。
items.ai_summary_en: Patents are strictly territorial rights; there is no single 'world patent' covering all jurisdictions. Protection in multiple countries requires separate national or regional titles. The Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) system streamlines this process by allowing a single application in one language to reserve rights across 158 contracting states. While the international phase does not grant patents, it provides an international search report and delays the need to enter specific national phases for up to 30–31 months, offering applicants time to assess market viability before committing to individual country filings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，国际后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders managing international portfolios, the PCT route serves as a critical procedural tool to defer high costs and complex decision-making. By utilizing the extended international phase, applicants can align their entry into specific European and US markets with commercial validation. This approach mitigates the financial risk of premature multi-jurisdictional filings while maintaining priority rights across a broad spectrum of potential markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["专利权具地域性，需分别在各国获取授权而非存在全球专利", "PCT 申请可统一入口并保留 158 国权利，延缓高额费用支出", "国际阶段仅出具检索报告，最终须进入各国阶段方可获权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Patents remain national or regional titles requiring separate grants for protection in each target jurisdiction.", "The PCT system allows a single application to reserve rights in 158 contracting states through one filing procedure.", "The international phase provides a search report and extends the timeline for entering national phases to 30-31 months."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 PCT 三十个月窗口期，精准评估欧洲目标市场后再布局", "避免直接多国递交，通过 PCT 降低前期资金压力与决策风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Use the PCT mechanism to delay substantial national phase costs until market potential is confirmed in key territories.", "Practice note: Leverage the 30-31 month window to conduct thorough prior art analysis and refine global filing strategies based on updated business goals.", "What to monitor: Track the expiration of the international phase deadlines to ensure timely transition into desired national or regional patent offices."]
core_points_en: Patents remain national or regional titles requiring separate grants for protection in each target jurisdiction.
The PCT system allows a single application to reserve rights in 158 contracting states through one filing procedure.
The international phase provides a search report and extends the timeline for entering national phases to 30-31 months.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Use the PCT mechanism to delay substantial national phase costs until market potential is confirmed in key territories.
Practice note: Leverage the 30-31 month window to conduct thorough prior art analysis and refine global filing strategies based on updated business goals.
What to monitor: Track the expiration of the international phase deadlines to ensure timely transition into desired national or regional patent offices.

items.title: L’INPI à GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026
items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 亮相 2026 巴黎创业者大会
items.title_en: INPI Engages Entrepreneurs at GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 on IP and Business Formalities
items.summary: L’INPI à GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 sgurtler@inpi.fr 17 avril 2026 Présent tout au long du salon GO Entrepreneurs, l’INPI a une nouvelle fois affirmé son engagement aux côtés des porteurs de projets, créateurs et dirigeants d’entreprise. Sur son stand, nos équipes ont accueilli plus de 1 000 visiteurs pour échanger autour de leurs enjeux et leur apporter des réponses, que ce soit en matière de propriété intellectuelle ou de formalités d’entreprise. Accompagnement à la création, protection des i
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）全程参与 2026 年巴黎创业者大会，设立展位接待超千名访客，提供知识产权与企业手续咨询。局方专家通过圆桌会议和研讨会指导初创企业，强调从公司注册到专利商标保护的全面支持，并指出知识产权是保障经济与技术主权的关键资产。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) participated in the GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 trade show, reaffirming its support for project leaders and business executives. INPI teams hosted over 1,000 visitors at their stand to address inquiries regarding intellectual property protection and corporate administrative formalities. The institute also conducted roundtables and workshops attended by more than 250 entrepreneurs. François-Xavier de Beaufort, Director of Enterprises at INPI, highlighted the institute's role in managing the single business gateway and protecting intangible assets through trademarks, designs, and patents. He emphasized that industrial property rights are essential for safeguarding economic and technological sovereignty, comparing unprotected innovations to a house without locks.
items.ai_insight_zh: 赴法或拟进入法国市场的中国企业应重视早期 IP 布局，利用 INPI 一站式服务降低合规成本。建议主动参与此类官方活动，获取最新政策指引，将品牌建设与技术保护纳入出海战略核心。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies operating in or entering the French market, the INPI’s active engagement underscores the importance of integrating IP strategy with early-stage business formation. The emphasis on the 'single gateway' suggests that administrative compliance and IP registration are increasingly interconnected processes. Rights holders should view IP not merely as a legal formality but as a fundamental component of asset security and economic sovereignty. Monitoring official INPI communications during such events can provide timely insights into procedural updates and strategic priorities relevant to portfolio management and enforcement readiness in France.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["INPI 在展会接待超千名访客，提供知产与行政手续咨询", "举办多场研讨活动，覆盖企业创立至创新保护全周期", "强调无知产保护的创新如同无锁房屋，易遭侵权占用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["INPI hosted over 1,000 visitors at GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 to provide guidance on IP protection and business creation formalities.", "Experts conducted workshops and roundtables for 250 entrepreneurs, covering innovation protection and intangible asset valorization strategies.", "INPI leadership stressed that IP rights act as critical safeguards for economic sovereignty, preventing unauthorized use of innovations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 INPI 一站式窗口，高效完成注册与知产保护布局", "强化无形资产保护意识，防范技术成果被恶意抢注风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Early integration of IP protection with business formalities enhances asset security and aligns with INPI's strategic focus on economic sovereignty.", "Practice note: Utilize INPI's single gateway services to streamline both corporate registration and initial IP filings for new ventures in France.", "What to monitor: Official statements from INPI leadership regarding the evolving role of IP in protecting technological investments and preventing infringement."]
core_points_en: INPI hosted over 1,000 visitors at GO Entrepreneurs Paris 2026 to provide guidance on IP protection and business creation formalities.
Experts conducted workshops and roundtables for 250 entrepreneurs, covering innovation protection and intangible asset valorization strategies.
INPI leadership stressed that IP rights act as critical safeguards for economic sovereignty, preventing unauthorized use of innovations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Early integration of IP protection with business formalities enhances asset security and aligns with INPI's strategic focus on economic sovereignty.
Practice note: Utilize INPI's single gateway services to streamline both corporate registration and initial IP filings for new ventures in France.
What to monitor: Official statements from INPI leadership regarding the evolving role of IP in protecting technological investments and preventing infringement.

items.title: Deutsche Patentanmeldungen in Digitaltechnologien legen stark zu
items.title_zh: 德国数字技术专利申请量大幅增长
items.title_en: German Patent Filings in Digital Technologies Surge, Driven by AI and Computer Engineering
items.summary: Deutsche Patentanmeldungen in Digitaltechnologien legen stark zu - Aktuelle DPMA-Analyse: Künstliche Intelligenz und digitale Vernetzung – Deutsche Unternehmen holen bei Anmeldungen für ihren Heimatmarkt in wichtigen Bereichen auf. DPMA-Präsidentin: Es geht um Wohlstand und digitale Souveränität – Konsequenter Schutz geistigen Eigentums Basis für den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg - Die Analyse zu Digitaltechnologien im Detail - Die Technologiefelder im Detail:Computertechnik - Digitale Kommunikationst
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）2026 年分析显示，2025 年德国本土数字关键技术领域专利申请公开量达 5051 件，同比增长 12.3%。其中计算机技术领域增长最快，增幅达 20.5%，主要涉及人工智能发明。德国在本土市场申请量排名全球第五，但增速仅次于中国，凸显其在数字主权和经济繁荣方面的战略投入。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) reports a significant increase in domestic patent applications within key digital technology sectors. In 2025, 5,051 applications with effect for the German market were published, representing a 12.3% year-on-year rise. German applicants rank fifth globally on their home market, trailing the US, China, South Korea, and Japan. However, Germany recorded the second-highest growth rate among these top five jurisdictions. The 'Computer Engineering' sector led this expansion with a 20.5% increase, largely attributed to inventions related to artificial intelligence. DPMA President Eva Schewior emphasized that robust intellectual property protection is fundamental to economic prosperity and digital sovereignty.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应关注德国数字技术专利布局加速趋势，特别是在 AI 和计算机技术领域。建议加强在德专利申请策略，评估潜在侵权风险，并利用当地知识产权制度保护自身创新成果，提升在欧洲市场的竞争力。
items.ai_insight_en: This data highlights a strategic intensification of IP activity in Germany's digital sector, particularly in AI. For rights holders operating in Europe, understanding the competitive density in computer engineering is crucial for portfolio positioning. The DPMA's emphasis on digital sovereignty suggests continued institutional support for domestic innovation, potentially influencing future enforcement priorities and examination practices in high-growth tech fields.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国数字技术专利申请量显著上升，计算机技术领域领跑", "人工智能相关发明是推动专利申请增长的主要驱动力", "DPMA 强调知识产权保护对维持经济竞争力至关重要"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Domestic patent filings in key digital technologies rose by 12.3% in 2025, reaching 5,051 published applications for the German market.", "Germany ranks fifth globally in domestic filings but achieved the second-highest growth rate among the top five nations.", "The Computer Engineering sector saw the strongest growth at 20.5%, driven primarily by artificial intelligence-related inventions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注德国 AI 领域专利动态，优化在欧布局策略", "强化知识产权防护，应对日益激烈的技术竞争"]

items.title: Candidate Support Programme expands access to EPAC certification in Europe
items.title_zh: EPO启动候选人支持计划，扩大欧洲专利行政认证准入
items.title_en: EPO Launches First Candidate Support Programme Cycle for EPAC Certification
items.summary: Candidate Support Programme expands access to EPAC certification in Europe
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）联合各国专利局启动首届“候选人支持计划”（CSP），旨在提升欧洲专利行政认证（EPAC）的可及性。该计划为入选者提供培训、辅导及考试费用资助。2026年首周期吸引16个成员国参与，收到62份申请，其中女性占比73%。EPAC采用模块化考试形式，涵盖欧洲及国际专利程序管理技能，旨在构建更具包容性的专利专业队伍，促进性别与地域平衡。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has initiated the first cycle of its Candidate Support Programme (CSP) dedicated to the European Patent Administration Certification (EPAC). Implemented with national patent offices, the initiative aims to foster a more inclusive and geographically balanced patent profession. Sixteen member states participated, nominating candidates who receive comprehensive support including training, tutoring, exam fees, and bursaries. The programme attracted 62 applications, with women comprising 73% of applicants. Selected candidates are now undergoing preparation for the modular EPAC examinations scheduled for November 2026, reflecting growing professional interest in standardized certification for patent administration.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注EPAC认证在提升专利流程管理专业性方面的价值。利用CSP等支持机制培养具备国际视野的专利行政人才，有助于优化对欧专利布局与维护效率，降低合规风险，并增强在欧洲创新生态系统中的专业影响力。
items.ai_insight_en: This development highlights the EPO's strategic push toward standardizing professional competencies in patent administration across Europe. For rights holders and corporate IP teams, the expansion of certified professionals may enhance the consistency and quality of procedural management within the European patent system. The high participation rate among women and diverse sectors suggests a shift towards broader accessibility in professional qualifications, potentially influencing hiring and training standards in the European IP sector.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO启动首届CSP计划，为EPAC候选人提供全方位培训与资金支持", "首周期获16个成员国响应，女性申请人占比高达73%，体现多样性", "EPAC实行模块化考试，验证专利行政人员处理欧专程序的专业能力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO launched the first CSP cycle for EPAC, offering selected candidates full financial and educational support from sixteen participating member states.", "Sixty-two applications were received, with women representing 73% of applicants across patent attorney offices, industry, and academia.", "Modular EPAC examinations are scheduled for 5 November 2026, validating skills required to manage European and international patent procedures."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注EPAC认证价值，提升对欧专利流程管理的专业性与合规性", "利用支持计划培养国际化专利行政人才，优化欧洲专利布局维护"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Standardized EPAC certification may improve the reliability of patent administration services, benefiting companies managing large European portfolios.", "Practice note: Monitor the uptake of EPAC-certified professionals in service providers to assess potential shifts in market expectations for procedural expertise.", "What to monitor: Future CSP cycles and nomination criteria by national offices to track evolving diversity and inclusion metrics in the European patent profession."]
core_points_en: The EPO launched the first CSP cycle for EPAC, offering selected candidates full financial and educational support from sixteen participating member states.
Sixty-two applications were received, with women representing 73% of applicants across patent attorney offices, industry, and academia.
Modular EPAC examinations are scheduled for 5 November 2026, validating skills required to manage European and international patent procedures.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Standardized EPAC certification may improve the reliability of patent administration services, benefiting companies managing large European portfolios.
Practice note: Monitor the uptake of EPAC-certified professionals in service providers to assess potential shifts in market expectations for procedural expertise.
What to monitor: Future CSP cycles and nomination criteria by national offices to track evolving diversity and inclusion metrics in the European patent profession.

items.title: The UPC aligns with the EPO on added matter (UPC_CFI_808/2025)
items.title_zh: UPC 巴黎分院在新增事项问题上与 EPO 立场趋同
items.title_en: UPC Paris Aligns with EPO Strict Added Matter Standard in Guardant Health Ruling
items.summary: Court docket: LD Paris
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 巴黎地方法院在 Guardant Health 诉 Sophia Genetics 案中裁定，分案申请若将原申请作为“碎片库”组合特征，构成新增事项。法院强调发明必须能直接明确推导，且原告仅凭新闻稿不足以证明侵权。此判决显示 UPC 在新增事项审查上采纳了类似 EPO 的严格标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In Guardant Health v. Sophia Genetics, the UPC Local Division in Paris rejected provisional measures, aligning its added matter assessment with the European Patent Office's strict approach. The Court held that combining scattered fragments from a PCT application without clear indication constitutes impermissible added matter. Additionally, the ruling clarified procedural standards, deeming a three-month preparation period reasonable for complex technologies. Crucially, the Court emphasized that press releases alone are insufficient to meet the burden of proof for infringement under Rule 211.2 RoP, requiring deeper technical evidence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局分案时需避免拼凑原申请特征，确保权利要求可直接推导。诉讼中应准备详尽技术文档而非依赖公开信息，以应对 UPC 严格的举证和审查标准。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision signals that the UPC is unlikely to adopt a more lenient stance on added matter compared to the EPO, particularly regarding divisional patents derived from broad PCT disclosures. For rights holders, this reinforces the need for precise claim drafting that avoids relying on implicit combinations of features. In litigation, parties must ensure robust evidentiary foundations beyond public statements to satisfy the high threshold for proving infringement in preliminary proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定从原申请分散片段组合特征构成新增事项", "原告仅凭新闻稿无法满足侵权举证的高度确定性要求", "UPC 在新增事项审查上与 EPO 严格立场趋于一致"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC adopted the EPO's strict test, ruling that combining scattered fragments from a PCT application constitutes added matter if not directly derivable.", "A three-month delay was deemed reasonable for preparing provisional measures applications involving complex technology and multiple patents.", "Press releases alone fail to demonstrate infringement with sufficient certainty; applicants must provide detailed technical documentation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["分案申请严禁将原说明书作为特征组合的素材库", "侵权诉讼需依托深层技术文档而非单一新闻发布"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should verify that divisional claims are directly and unambiguously derivable from original filings to withstand UPC scrutiny.", "Practice note: Litigants seeking provisional measures must secure detailed technical documentation rather than relying solely on press releases or public information.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions will clarify whether this strict alignment with EPO added matter standards persists across different Local Divisions."]
core_points_en: The UPC adopted the EPO's strict test, ruling that combining scattered fragments from a PCT application constitutes added matter if not directly derivable.
A three-month delay was deemed reasonable for preparing provisional measures applications involving complex technology and multiple patents.
Press releases alone fail to demonstrate infringement with sufficient certainty; applicants must provide detailed technical documentation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should verify that divisional claims are directly and unambiguously derivable from original filings to withstand UPC scrutiny.
Practice note: Litigants seeking provisional measures must secure detailed technical documentation rather than relying solely on press releases or public information.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions will clarify whether this strict alignment with EPO added matter standards persists across different Local Divisions.

items.title: Quality dashboard: quarterly update
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局更新质量仪表盘：2026年一季度数据
items.title_en: EPO Quality Dashboard Update: Q1 2026 Search and Examination KPIs
items.summary: An exchange on insights, best practices and shared values to advance gender parity in innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）更新其质量仪表盘，公布2026年第一季度审计数据。检索方面，93.5%的审计检索未发现新颖性或创造性问题；审查方面，89.5%的授权专利无影响有效性的缺陷，其中新增主题问题比例降至3.9%。该仪表盘自2024年3月启动，旨在通过定期发布关键绩效指标（KPI），提升专利授予过程的透明度，并支持年度质量行动计划。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has updated its Quality dashboard with audit figures for the first quarter of 2026. The data indicates sustained high quality in search operations, with 93.5% of audited searches showing no findings regarding novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter. In examination, a positive trend continues as 89.5% of audited grants had no validity-affecting findings. Notably, issues related to added subject-matter decreased from 4.6% to 3.9%, reflecting the impact of implemented quality measures across operational teams.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The continued improvement in EPO examination metrics, particularly the reduction in added subject-matter objections, signals a maturing quality framework under the annual Quality Action Plan. For rights holders and applicants, these transparent KPIs provide a benchmark for assessing procedural reliability. Monitoring these trends helps stakeholders align internal drafting and prosecution strategies with the Office's evolving quality expectations, potentially reducing procedural delays and enhancing grant predictability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年Q1检索审计显示93.5%无新颖性或创造性缺陷", "审查授权质量持续向好，新增主题问题比例降至3.9%", "质量仪表盘定期发布KPI以增强专利授予流程透明度"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Search quality remains high with 93.5% of audited searches free of novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter findings.", "Examination quality improves as 89.5% of audited grants show no validity defects, continuing a positive quarterly trend.", "Findings on added subject-matter dropped to 3.9%, demonstrating the effectiveness of recent EPO quality enhancement measures."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化前端检索与撰写质量，规避新增主题风险", "参考EPO KPI优化内部质检，提升授权效率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Transparent KPIs allow applicants to gauge the stability of EPO grants and adjust portfolio quality standards accordingly.", "Practice note: The decline in added subject-matter findings suggests that rigorous internal review of claim amendments is yielding better alignment with EPO practices.", "What to monitor: Future quarterly updates to track whether the downward trend in validity-related findings sustains through subsequent quarters."]
core_points_en: Search quality remains high with 93.5% of audited searches free of novelty, inventive step, or added subject-matter findings.
Examination quality improves as 89.5% of audited grants show no validity defects, continuing a positive quarterly trend.
Findings on added subject-matter dropped to 3.9%, demonstrating the effectiveness of recent EPO quality enhancement measures.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Transparent KPIs allow applicants to gauge the stability of EPO grants and adjust portfolio quality standards accordingly.
Practice note: The decline in added subject-matter findings suggests that rigorous internal review of claim amendments is yielding better alignment with EPO practices.
What to monitor: Future quarterly updates to track whether the downward trend in validity-related findings sustains through subsequent quarters.

items.title: EUIPO Report on IP-Backed Finance Makes Policy Recommendations to Unlock Up To €580 Billion in Innovation Financing
items.title_zh: EUIPO 报告建议释放高达 5800 亿欧元创新融资
items.title_en: EUIPO Report Proposes Policy Changes to Unlock €580 Billion in IP-Backed SME Financing
items.summary: Today, the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) published a study exploring challenges faced by EU small- and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in obtaining financing by offering intellectual property (IP) as collateral. Set against the backdrop of the EU’s recently launched Savings and Investment Union (SIU) program, the EUIPO’s study identifies several structural barriers preventing SMEs from obtaining IP-backed financing and concludes with a series of policy recommendations desig
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布研究报告，探讨欧盟中小企业以知识产权为抵押获取融资时面临的挑战。该研究结合欧盟储蓄与投资联盟计划，识别了阻碍知识产权融资的结构性障碍，并提出一系列政策建议，旨在缩小中小企业信贷缺口，释放高达 5800 亿欧元的经济价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has published a study examining the difficulties EU small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) face when seeking financing using intellectual property as collateral. Contextualized within the EU's newly launched Savings and Investment Union (SIU) program, the report identifies specific structural barriers that hinder access to credit for these businesses. It concludes with a series of policy recommendations aimed at bridging the SME credit gap. The EUIPO estimates that addressing these obstacles could unlock up to €580 billion in innovation financing, thereby generating significant economic value for the broader EU market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业应关注欧盟 IP 融资新政，评估将商标专利转化为抵押品的可行性。建议提前规范 IP 资产管理，利用潜在政策红利拓宽融资渠道，降低资金成本。
items.ai_insight_en: This report signals a potential shift in how IP assets are valued and utilized within the EU financial ecosystem. For rights holders and corporate counsel, understanding these structural barriers is essential for strategic asset management. As policymakers consider reforms to facilitate IP-backed lending, companies should assess their current IP portfolios for readiness to serve as collateral. This development may influence future licensing strategies and capital raising approaches for innovation-driven firms operating in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO 发布报告分析中小企业 IP 融资难的结构障碍", "研究旨在配合欧盟储蓄与投资联盟计划解决信贷缺口", "提出政策建议以释放高达 5800 亿欧元的创新资金"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EUIPO study highlights structural barriers preventing EU SMEs from securing financing via IP collateral.", "Report aligns with the EU Savings and Investment Union initiative to address systemic credit gaps.", "Policy recommendations aim to unlock an estimated €580 billion in potential innovation financing."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧盟 IP 融资政策动向，评估资产抵押可行性", "规范知识产权管理，利用新政红利拓宽融资渠道"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess portfolio readiness for potential IP-backed financing opportunities under new EU frameworks.", "Practice note: Monitor structural barrier definitions to align internal IP valuation and documentation standards.", "What to monitor: Track legislative progress on the Savings and Investment Union regarding IP collateral recognition."]
core_points_en: EUIPO study highlights structural barriers preventing EU SMEs from securing financing via IP collateral.
Report aligns with the EU Savings and Investment Union initiative to address systemic credit gaps.
Policy recommendations aim to unlock an estimated €580 billion in potential innovation financing.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess portfolio readiness for potential IP-backed financing opportunities under new EU frameworks.
Practice note: Monitor structural barrier definitions to align internal IP valuation and documentation standards.
What to monitor: Track legislative progress on the Savings and Investment Union regarding IP collateral recognition.

items.title: [Blog] Palmarès 2025 Des Déposants De Brevets À L’INPI
items.title_zh: 法国 INPI 发布 2025 年专利申请排行榜
items.title_en: INPI Releases 2025 Patent Filing Rankings: Stellantis and Safran Lead National Applications
items.summary: L’Institut national de la propriété industrielle (INPI) a publié son palmarès 2025 des déposants de brevets, fondé sur les demandes déposées par la voie nationale entre le 1er janvier et le 31 décembre 2025.
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年国家途径专利申请排行榜。数据显示申请量同比增长 9%，Stellantis 与 Safran 连续三年位居前二，雷诺集团位列第三。汽车、航空及交通领域主导榜单，九家公共研究机构入选，外国申请人占比超一成，凸显法国作为专利保护地的吸引力。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) published its 2025 ranking of patent applicants based on national filings from January to December 2025. The data reveals a 9% increase in applications compared to 2024, reinforcing the dominance of major industrial groups in France's inventive activity. Stellantis and Safran retained the top two positions for the third consecutive year, followed by Renault Group. Foreign entities accounted for over 10% of filers, while nine public research organizations, including CEA and CNRS, featured prominently. The automotive, aerospace, and transport sectors comprised nearly one-third of the ranked companies.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The sustained growth in national filings and the prominence of specific industrial sectors highlight France's continued attractiveness for patent protection. For rights holders, the stability of top-ranking entities suggests entrenched competitive dynamics in automotive and aerospace technologies. The significant presence of public research institutions indicates robust opportunities for collaborative innovation. Monitoring these trends assists in benchmarking portfolio density against key competitors and understanding the strategic focus areas within the French market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年法国国家专利申请量同比增长 9%，大型工业集团主导创新活动", "Stellantis 和 Safran 稳居前两名，汽车与航空业占据近三分之一席位", "外国企业占比超 10%，九家科研机构上榜，显示多元创新生态活力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Stellantis and Safran maintained their top positions with 1,294 and 1,266 national patent applications respectively, marking their third consecutive year leading the INPI rankings.", "National patent filings rose by 9% in 2025, driven largely by large industrial groups, with foreign applicants representing more than 10% of the total filing base.", "The automotive, aerospace, and transport sectors dominated the sectoral distribution, accounting for nearly one-third of the ranked entities ahead of digital and health industries."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["聚焦汽车与新能源领域，对标头部企业优化在法专利布局策略", "善用国家途径降低成本，深化与当地科研机构合作以增强竞争力"]

items.title: Determining Personalized Content To Be Inserted Into A Phishing Document Template: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 确定植入钓鱼文档模板的个性化内容：非技术性
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Phishing Content Selection Non-Technical Business Method
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method for the automated creation of personalized phishing documents, intended for corporate security awareness training, that uses two separate databases...
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1908/23 号案件中裁定，一种用于企业安全意识培训的自动化钓鱼文档生成方法缺乏技术性。该方案利用分层数据库和相关性值匹配来选择针对特定目标的认知内容。委员会认为，其核心在于选择具有心理欺骗效果的内容，属于 COMVIK 方法下的“商业方法”，单纯的数据库结构未贡献足够的创造性步骤。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1908/23, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.05 rejected a patent application for automated creation of personalized phishing documents used in corporate security training. The Board applied the COMVIK approach, determining that the hierarchical database structure and relevance-value matching process served to select cognitive content aimed at psychologically deceiving recipients. Consequently, these features were classified as non-technical business methods. The mere use of undefined database structures and parameter comparisons did not establish a technical contribution sufficient to support an inventive step under European patent law.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及 AI 内容生成或网络安全培训专利时，需警惕“商业方法”排除风险。若发明核心仅是基于规则的内容匹配或心理策略，即便使用数据库，也难获授权。建议将权利要求聚焦于具体数据处理架构或底层技术改进，以体现真实技术贡献。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the strict separation between technical data processing and cognitive content selection in EPO practice. Applicants in cybersecurity and AI-driven content generation must ensure claims focus on underlying technical architectures or specific data handling improvements rather than the logic of content personalization itself. Merely automating a psychological strategy via standard IT tools is insufficient for patentability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["分层数据库与相关性匹配被视为选择认知内容的非技术手段", "旨在心理欺骗人类接收者的内容选择构成商业方法而非技术方案", "未定义的技术参数比较不足以确立满足创造性步骤的技术贡献"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Hierarchical databases and relevance matching for selecting phishing content are deemed non-technical business methods.", "Selecting psychologically effective content for human recipients lacks technical character under the COMVIK framework.", "Undefined database structures and parameter comparisons do not independently establish inventive step contributions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免将纯内容匹配逻辑包装为技术方案，需突出底层技术改进", "涉 AI 生成类专利申请应着重描述数据处理的特定技术架构"]

items.title: Brevet et modèle : deux atouts complémentaires pour protéger votre innovation
items.title_zh: 专利与设计：保护创新的两项互补资产
items.title_en: INPI Highlights Patents and Designs as Complementary Assets for Innovation Protection
items.summary: Brevet et modèle : deux atouts complémentaires pour protéger votre innovation llegrand@inpi.fr 09 avril 2026 Imaginez qu'un concurrent commercialise une télécommande qui ressemble trait pour trait à la vôtre : même mécanisme interne, même design extérieur. C'est précisément ce qu'a vécu la société Somfy. En 2006, le Tribunal de grande instance de Paris a sanctionné un concurrent qui copiait à la fois les mécanismes internes et l'apparence extérieure des télécommandes Somfy. Le tribunal a condamn
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）发文指出，专利与设计是保护产品的互补工具。文章引用 Somfy 遥控器及 Bivouac 刀具案，展示法院如何分别认定技术功能与外观设计的侵权并判处独立赔偿。核心结论强调，单一专利无法覆盖产品全貌，组合布局可构建更稳固的法律防线，即使专利无效，设计权仍可独立存续提供保护。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) emphasizes the strategic value of combining patent and design rights to protect innovations comprehensively. Citing the 2006 Somfy case, the article illustrates how Paris courts awarded distinct damages for infringing both internal mechanisms (patents) and external appearance (designs). Similarly, the 'Bivouac' knife case confirmed that aesthetic choices are legally independent from technical functions. This dual approach ensures robust legal coverage, allowing rights holders to claim separate compensation for each type of infringement and maintain protection even if one title is challenged.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口高附加值产品时，切勿仅依赖专利申请。应同步评估产品外观价值，主动注册欧盟或成员国外观设计，构建“技术 + 外观”双重壁垒，以应对竞争对手的模仿诉讼及潜在的专利无效挑战，最大化维权收益。
items.ai_insight_en: This guidance underscores the importance of integrated IP strategies for companies operating in France. Relying solely on patents leaves the visual identity of a product vulnerable to imitation. By securing both technical and aesthetic rights, rights holders can maximize enforcement leverage and ensure continuous protection against comprehensive copying by competitors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["专利保护技术方案，设计保护外观美学，两者客体不同互不替代", "司法实践中，针对同一产品的技术与外观抄袭可分别定罪并累计赔偿", "构建专利与设计组合布局，能有效规避单一权利被无效后的保护真空风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Patents protect technical solutions while designs safeguard aesthetic appearance, covering distinct aspects of a product.", "French courts award separate damages for patent and design infringements, recognizing them as independent legal violations.", "Combining patents and designs creates a resilient portfolio, ensuring protection remains valid even if one right is invalidated."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["推行“专利 + 设计”双轨布局，避免因单一权利瑕疵导致全面失守", "利用法国判例经验，在维权诉讼中主张技术与外观的双重独立赔偿"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Companies should evaluate both functional and aesthetic features during IP planning to avoid protection gaps.", "Practice note: In litigation, pleadings should clearly distinguish between technical and design infringements to secure cumulative damages.", "What to monitor: Monitor judicial trends regarding the independence of design rights when associated patents face nullity actions."]
core_points_en: Patents protect technical solutions while designs safeguard aesthetic appearance, covering distinct aspects of a product.
French courts award separate damages for patent and design infringements, recognizing them as independent legal violations.
Combining patents and designs creates a resilient portfolio, ensuring protection remains valid even if one right is invalidated.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies should evaluate both functional and aesthetic features during IP planning to avoid protection gaps.
Practice note: In litigation, pleadings should clearly distinguish between technical and design infringements to secure cumulative damages.
What to monitor: Monitor judicial trends regarding the independence of design rights when associated patents face nullity actions.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 30, 2026, Order, UPC_CoA_302/2025, CoA_305/2025
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭裁定费用确定须由一审法院启动
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules Cost Determination Must Start at First Instance
items.summary: Cost determination proceedings must always be initiated at the Court of First Instance, regardless of whether costs arise from first instance or appeal (R. 150 et seq. RoP)
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭在涉及 Rematec 与 Europe Forestry 的案件中作出命令，明确依据《程序规则》第 150 条及以下条款，费用确定程序必须向一审法院提起。即便费用产生于上诉阶段，上诉庭也无权直接受理或转交该申请，因规则未设特别程序且此举将剥夺当事人的上诉权。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal clarified that cost determination proceedings under Rules 150 et seq. RoP constitute a separate procedural track that must always be initiated before the Court of First Instance. This requirement applies irrespective of whether the costs were incurred during first instance or appellate proceedings. The Court emphasized that initiating such applications at the Court of Appeal would undermine the statutory right to appeal cost decisions under Rules 157 and 221 RoP. Furthermore, the Court of Appeal lacks the legal authority to refer cost applications to the Court of First Instance, as referrals are strictly limited to scenarios expressly provided for in the UPCA or Rules of Procedure.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 诉讼中需严格遵循程序管辖，胜诉后务必向一审法院而非上诉庭申请费用裁定，避免因程序错误导致权利落空，建议提前布局一审阶段的费用证据保全。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling establishes strict jurisdictional boundaries for recovering litigation expenses within the Unified Patent Court system. Rights holders and litigants must ensure that any application for cost determination is directed exclusively to the Court of First Instance, even following an appellate judgment. Misdirecting these applications to the Court of Appeal risks procedural dismissal or delay, as the appellate division has confirmed it lacks the competence to process or transfer such requests. Proper adherence to this procedural pathway is essential for effective enforcement of cost awards.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["费用确定程序属独立诉讼，必须向统一专利法院一审法院提起", "无论费用源于一审还是上诉，上诉庭均无权直接受理费用裁定申请", "程序规则未授权上诉庭将费用申请转交一审，仅限法定情形可转交"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Cost determination is a distinct proceeding requiring filing at the Court of First Instance under Rules 150 et seq. RoP.", "Applications must target the Court of First Instance regardless of whether costs stem from first instance or appeal stages.", "The Court of Appeal cannot refer cost applications to the Court of First Instance absent explicit statutory authorization."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["费用申请须精准投递至一审法院，切勿误向上诉庭提交", "需在一审阶段即完善费用证据链，以備后续独立程序使用"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensures correct forum selection for cost recovery, preventing procedural errors that could delay or jeopardize expense reimbursement.", "Practice note: File all cost determination applications with the Court of First Instance immediately after final judgments, avoiding the Court of Appeal.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of Rule 150 et seq. regarding evidence submission timelines and potential amendments to referral mechanisms."]
core_points_en: Cost determination is a distinct proceeding requiring filing at the Court of First Instance under Rules 150 et seq. RoP.
Applications must target the Court of First Instance regardless of whether costs stem from first instance or appeal stages.
The Court of Appeal cannot refer cost applications to the Court of First Instance absent explicit statutory authorization.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensures correct forum selection for cost recovery, preventing procedural errors that could delay or jeopardize expense reimbursement.
Practice note: File all cost determination applications with the Court of First Instance immediately after final judgments, avoiding the Court of Appeal.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of Rule 150 et seq. regarding evidence submission timelines and potential amendments to referral mechanisms.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 27, 2026, Decision, UPC_CoA_409/2025, UPC_CoA_410/2025, UPC_CoA_420/2025
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院裁定登录系统不构成应诉管辖
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: CMS Login Does Not Constitute Entering an Appearance Under Brussels Ia
items.summary: Logging into the UPC's Case Management System does not constitute an "entering of an appearance" to establish jurisdiction under the Brussels Ia Regulation.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在涉及 NUC Electronics 与 Hurom 的案件中裁定，被告仅登录案件管理系统查看文件，不构成《布鲁塞尔条例 Ia》意义上的“出庭应诉”。法院指出，确立管辖权需被告采取实质性步骤，如提交初步异议或答辩状，单纯访问不足以视为对法院管辖权的自愿接受或争议确认。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal ruled that merely logging into the Case Management System to access case files does not amount to 'entering an appearance' under Article 26(1) of the Brussels Ia Regulation. The decision clarifies that passive file access lacks the deliberate choice required to establish jurisdiction. Jurisdiction is only confirmed when a defendant takes active procedural steps, such as filing a Preliminary Objection regarding jurisdiction or submitting a Statement of Defence on the merits. This distinction prevents accidental submission to UPC jurisdiction through routine administrative access.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，切勿因登录查看案情而误判为已应诉。应严格把控首次提交文件的时机与内容，避免因程序性操作不当导致丧失管辖权异议权利，需由专业律师评估后采取行动。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides critical clarity for rights holders and defendants managing cross-border patent disputes within the UPC framework. It confirms that preliminary case assessment activities, such as reviewing documents in the digital system, do not inadvertently waive jurisdictional objections. Legal teams can safely monitor proceedings without fear of accidental submission, provided they refrain from filing substantive responses before deciding on their jurisdictional strategy.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅登录 UPC 系统查看文件不视为法律意义上的出庭应诉行为", "确立管辖权需提交初步异议或实体答辩等实质性诉讼步骤", "明确区分被动查阅与主动抗辩，防止管辖权被意外确立"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Passive access to UPC case files via the Case Management System does not constitute entering an appearance under Brussels Ia Regulation.", "Establishing jurisdiction requires active procedural steps, specifically filing a Preliminary Objection or a Statement of Defence.", "The ruling distinguishes between mere file inspection and the deliberate legal choice to submit to the court's international jurisdiction."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["登录系统查阅卷宗不会触发管辖权，企业可安全进行初步评估", "首次提交异议或答辩状是确立管辖的关键节点，须谨慎决策"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can review UPC case materials without risking accidental acceptance of the court's jurisdiction under EU regulations.", "Practice note: Ensure no substantive filings are made until a formal decision on jurisdictional challenges or defense strategy is finalized.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes an 'active step' beyond standard pleadings that might trigger jurisdictional consent."]
core_points_en: Passive access to UPC case files via the Case Management System does not constitute entering an appearance under Brussels Ia Regulation.
Establishing jurisdiction requires active procedural steps, specifically filing a Preliminary Objection or a Statement of Defence.
The ruling distinguishes between mere file inspection and the deliberate legal choice to submit to the court's international jurisdiction.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can review UPC case materials without risking accidental acceptance of the court's jurisdiction under EU regulations.
Practice note: Ensure no substantive filings are made until a formal decision on jurisdictional challenges or defense strategy is finalized.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes an 'active step' beyond standard pleadings that might trigger jurisdictional consent.

items.title: Accord PPH avec les États-Unis
items.title_zh: 法国与美国达成专利审查高速路（PPH）协议
items.title_en: INPI and USPTO Establish Patent Prosecution Highway Agreement for Accelerated Examination
items.summary: Accord PPH avec les États-Unis llegrand@inpi.fr 02 avril 2026 Les conditions pour utiliser le PPH Les déposants peuvent demander l'accélération du traitement de leur demande auprès de l'un des deux offices à partir du moment où elle aura été examiné par l'autre office, indépendamment de l'ordre chronologique des dépôts et des revendications de priorité. De manière classique, après dépôt d'une requête PPH, le traitement d'une demande de brevet déposée à l'INPI et revendiquant la priorité d'une de
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局（INPI）宣布与美国专利商标局（USPTO）建立专利审查高速路（PPH）机制。申请人若其申请已获一方办公室认定为可授权，可请求另一方加速审查，不受申请顺序限制。该程序在法国免费，旨在缩短审查周期，美国平均九个月内发出审查意见，要求权利要求范围相同或更窄。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has announced a Patent Prosecution Highway (PPH) agreement with the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO). This mechanism allows applicants to request accelerated examination in either jurisdiction once the corresponding application has been examined by the other office, regardless of filing chronology or priority claims. Specifically, if the USPTO deems certain claims patentable, an INPI application with similar or narrower claims may qualify for fast-track processing. Conversely, INPI can accelerate examination for USPTO applications claiming priority from an INPI filing deemed patentable. The PPH request is free of charge in France, while the USPTO typically issues a patentability opinion within nine months under this program.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在法美同时布局专利时，应充分利用此免费加速通道。建议优先在美或法获取有利审查结果，随即启动 PPH 请求，以低成本快速获得双方法域专利权，提升海外维权与市场准入效率。
items.ai_insight_en: This agreement provides a cost-effective pathway for rights holders managing parallel patent portfolios in France and the United States. By leveraging positive examination outcomes from one office, applicants can potentially shorten the pendency period in the other jurisdiction without incurring additional official fees for the acceleration request. This alignment supports more predictable prosecution timelines for transatlantic intellectual property strategies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法美双向加速：任一局先行审查合格后，另一局可依请求加速处理", "权利要求一致性：加速申请需基于已被认定可授权的相同或更窄权利要求", "零成本高效率：法国境内提交 PPH 请求免费，显著缩短获权等待时间"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Accelerated examination is available bidirectionally between INPI and USPTO once the counterpart office determines claims are patentable.", "Claims in the second-filed application must be sufficiently similar or narrower than those accepted as patentable by the first examining office.", "PPH requests at INPI are free of charge, aiming to reduce procedural delays compared to standard examination timelines."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用单方授权结果，低成本实现法美双地快速确权", "优化申请策略，通过 PPH 机制缩短产品上市前的法律不确定期"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders with dual filings in France and the US can leverage positive examination results to expedite grant procedures in the counterpart jurisdiction.", "Practice note: Ensure that claims submitted to the second office are drafted to match or restrict the scope of claims already found patentable by the first office.", "What to monitor: Track the specific procedural requirements and timing expectations for PPH requests at both INPI and USPTO to optimize docketing strategies."]
core_points_en: Accelerated examination is available bidirectionally between INPI and USPTO once the counterpart office determines claims are patentable.
Claims in the second-filed application must be sufficiently similar or narrower than those accepted as patentable by the first examining office.
PPH requests at INPI are free of charge, aiming to reduce procedural delays compared to standard examination timelines.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders with dual filings in France and the US can leverage positive examination results to expedite grant procedures in the counterpart jurisdiction.
Practice note: Ensure that claims submitted to the second office are drafted to match or restrict the scope of claims already found patentable by the first office.
What to monitor: Track the specific procedural requirements and timing expectations for PPH requests at both INPI and USPTO to optimize docketing strategies.

items.title_zh: 表格：申请专利未认证副本
items.title_en: UKIPO Form for Requesting Uncertified Patent Copies or Comptroller Certificates
items.summary: Use this form to request a certificate of the Comptroller or an uncertified copy from a file or the register.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布专用表格，供公众向主计长申请专利证书或从档案及注册簿中获取未经认证的专利副本。该文件明确了行政申请流程，旨在规范专利文献的复制与分发服务，确保申请人及公众能合法、便捷地获取官方专利记录，属于基础行政程序指引。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published a specific form for requesting uncertified copies of patent documents from the register or file. This administrative tool also allows users to request a certificate issued by the Comptroller. The guidance outlines the procedural mechanism for accessing these official records, ensuring that applicants and the public can obtain necessary documentation through the designated channel.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This update clarifies the administrative pathway for retrieving uncertified patent copies and Comptroller certificates in the UK. For rights holders and legal practitioners, understanding the correct forms for document retrieval is essential for maintaining accurate portfolio records and preparing factual evidence. It ensures compliance with UKIPO procedural requirements when accessing official patent data.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["提供申请主计长证书或未认证副本的专用官方表格", "明确可从专利档案或注册簿中提取相关文件副本", "规范英国专利文献获取的行政程序与服务标准"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["A dedicated form is available for requesting uncertified copies of patents from the UKIPO register or file.", "Users may also utilize this form to apply for an official certificate issued by the Comptroller of Patents.", "The publication standardizes the administrative process for obtaining specific patent-related documents and certifications."]

core_points_en: A dedicated form is available for requesting uncertified copies of patents from the UKIPO register or file.
Users may also utilize this form to apply for an official certificate issued by the Comptroller of Patents.
