items.title: CJEU on continuity, heritage, and deceptive trademarks – Fauré Le Page Paris 1717
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定商标标注虚构年份可能构成欺骗
items.title_en: CJEU Clarifies Deception Threshold for Heritage Marks: Fauré Le Page Paris 1717
items.summary: To which extent can a sign invoke heritage, age, and prestige before it crosses into deception? In the luxury sector, a trademark’s reference to a long history can signal continuity, know-how, and quality, making the line between genuine legacy and misleading branding especially thin. On 26 March 2026, the CJEU drew that boundary by stating that the difference lay in whether a business had been acquired as a whole or whether only the trademark had changed hands (C‑412/24).
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Fauré Le Page 案中明确，若企业仅受让商标而非整体业务，却在商标中加入暗示悠久历史的年份（如 1717），可能因误导消费者关于商品连续性、技艺及声望而构成欺骗。法院强调，欺骗须涉及商品特征，但在奢侈品领域，声誉形象属于关键特征。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C‑412/24, the Court of Justice of the European Union addressed whether a trademark incorporating a historical date constitutes deception under Article 3(1)(g) of Directive 2008/95/EC. The case concerned 'Fauré Le Page Paris 1717', filed by an entity that acquired only the trademark rights after the original business ceased operations in 1992. The CJEU held that using a date implying centuries of continuity can mislead consumers regarding the goods' characteristics, specifically heritage and know-how, when no actual business transfer occurred. The Court emphasized that while deception must relate to product characteristics, reputation and prestige are intrinsic features in the luxury sector, making such misleading indications sufficient to establish a risk of deception.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧注册含历史元素的奢侈品商标时，需确保商业实体与历史传承的真实性关联。若仅收购商标而无业务延续，应避免使用暗示悠久历史的年份或描述，以防被认定为欺骗性商标导致无效或被禁。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the boundary between legitimate brand heritage marketing and deceptive practices in the EU. Rights holders acquiring legacy marks must ensure that any reference to historical dates or longevity accurately reflects the continuity of the business entity and its know-how. Misrepresenting the origin or history of production capabilities, particularly in sectors where reputation drives consumer choice, poses significant validity risks. Practitioners should carefully assess the factual basis of historical claims embedded in new filings or rebranding efforts following asset-only acquisitions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅受让商标未承接整体业务时，标注历史年份易致欺骗", "奢侈品商标的声望形象被视为商品本身的重要特征", "虚构年份暗示技艺传承若无事实依据则违反商标指令"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["A trademark including a historical date may be deceptive if it falsely implies continuity of know-how from an original undertaking to the current owner.", "Deception under EU law requires misrepresentation of goods' characteristics; however, prestige and heritage are key characteristics in the luxury market.", "Acquiring only trademark rights without the underlying historic business does not justify claims of long-standing tradition or inherited craftsmanship."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["收购旧品牌商标时需核实是否包含整体业务资产", "避免在无实际传承时使用历史年份营销以防法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Brands acquiring legacy trademarks must verify if historical references in new marks align with actual business continuity to avoid invalidity for deception.", "Practice note: When filing marks with historical elements post-acquisition, distinguish between mere trademark ownership and the transfer of the underlying undertaking's goodwill…", "What to monitor: How national courts apply this CJEU standard to other luxury sectors where brand prestige and perceived heritage significantly influence consumer purchasing decis…"]
core_points_en: A trademark including a historical date may be deceptive if it falsely implies continuity of know-how from an original undertaking to the current owner.
Deception under EU law requires misrepresentation of goods' characteristics; however, prestige and heritage are key characteristics in the luxury market.
Acquiring only trademark rights without the underlying historic business does not justify claims of long-standing tradition or inherited craftsmanship.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands acquiring legacy trademarks must verify if historical references in new marks align with actual business continuity to avoid invalidity for deception.
Practice note: When filing marks with historical elements post-acquisition, distinguish between mere trademark ownership and the transfer of the underlying undertaking's goodwill…
What to monitor: How national courts apply this CJEU standard to other luxury sectors where brand prestige and perceived heritage significantly influence consumer purchasing decis…

items.title: Filing in DOCX now available for all users - greater flexibility and smoother workflows
items.title_zh: EPO 向所有用户开放 DOCX 格式提交以提升灵活性
items.title_en: EPO Opens DOCX Filing to All Users for Enhanced Flexibility and Workflow Efficiency
items.summary: The new filing format builds on the EPO’s digital transformation, offering a more consistent and future-ready way to submit patent applications and other documents.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布在完成试点后，正式向所有用户开放使用 DOCX 格式提交欧洲专利申请及后续文件。此举旨在深化数字化转型，允许绘图嵌入文档或单独上传，减少格式转换错误与人工校对时间。该更新已纳入局长决定，支持与 MyEPO 等现代工具无缝对接，实现端到端数字化处理。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has officially rolled out support for filing European patent applications and subsequent documents in DOCX format to all users. Following a successful pilot phase, this initiative aligns with the EPO’s Strategic Plan 2028 to foster a fully digital granting process. The new format allows applicants to integrate drawings directly into DOCX files or submit them separately as PDFs. This update aims to streamline end-to-end digital workflows, reduce formatting errors, and improve data quality during search, examination, and publication stages. The Decision of the President concerning electronic filing has been amended to reflect these changes, offering greater consistency and time savings for rights holders and representatives.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development supports portfolio management efficiency by minimizing administrative burdens associated with document conversion and formatting compliance. For European and US practitioners, adopting native DOCX workflows can enhance data integrity throughout the prosecution lifecycle. The ability to maintain stable paragraph references and reduce layout shifts facilitates smoother amendments and responses to examination reports. Rights holders should evaluate their internal document preparation systems to leverage these digital advantages, ensuring compatibility with future EPO tools and services while maintaining high-quality submissions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 全面推广 DOCX 格式，支持专利申请及后续文件提交", "绘图可嵌入 DOCX 或单独以 PDF 提交，提升操作灵活性", "减少格式错误与重复转换，显著优化审查与修改流程效率"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DOCX filing is now available for all users, supporting the EPO's goal of a fully digital patent granting environment.", "Applicants may embed drawings directly within DOCX documents or file them separately as PDFs based on preference.", "The format reduces manual checks and formatting corrections, improving text stability and character handling."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["立即调整申请文件制作流程，优先采用原生 DOCX 格式", "利用格式优势减少补正通知，加快欧洲专利授权进程"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adopting DOCX filing can reduce time spent on manual formatting checks and minimize risks of corrupted characters or layout errors.", "Practice note: Teams should review internal drafting protocols to allow direct integration of drawings into DOCX or manage separate PDF submissions effectively.", "What to monitor: Updates to the EPO Notice and feature guides regarding specific technical requirements for DOCX submissions and future tool integrations."]
core_points_en: DOCX filing is now available for all users, supporting the EPO's goal of a fully digital patent granting environment.
Applicants may embed drawings directly within DOCX documents or file them separately as PDFs based on preference.
The format reduces manual checks and formatting corrections, improving text stability and character handling.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adopting DOCX filing can reduce time spent on manual formatting checks and minimize risks of corrupted characters or layout errors.
Practice note: Teams should review internal drafting protocols to allow direct integration of drawings into DOCX or manage separate PDF submissions effectively.
What to monitor: Updates to the EPO Notice and feature guides regarding specific technical requirements for DOCX submissions and future tool integrations.

items.title: The Unitary Patent Guidelines April 2026 update
items.title_zh: 2026年4月统一专利指南更新生效
items.title_en: EPO Updates Unitary Patent Guidelines: Key Procedural Clarity Changes Effective April 2026
items.summary: Updated 2026 Unitary Patent Guidelines take effect 1 April, enhancing clarity, procedures, and legal detail across the UPC system.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）运行近三年后，统一专利（UP）指南迎来修订，新版于2026年4月1日生效。此次更新旨在提升UPC系统的清晰度、程序规范及法律细节。欧洲专利局（EPO）已发布标注修改痕迹的2026版指南，对比2025版进行了广泛调整。随着对UP系统及UPC信心的增强，新规在适当位置增加了更多程序与法律依据的细节，以优化用户体验并明确操作标准。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has published updated Unitary Patent Guidelines, which entered into force on 1 April 2026. Following nearly three years of Unified Patent Court operations, these amendments refine procedural clarity and legal detail across the system. A marked-up version comparing the 2026 guidelines against the 2025 version is available to help users track specific changes. The updates reflect growing confidence in the Unitary Patent system and aim to provide greater transparency regarding procedural requirements and legal bases for applicants and litigants.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders managing European portfolios, the refined guidelines offer improved predictability in Unitary Patent administration and UPC interactions. The availability of a tracked-changes document allows counsel to efficiently identify procedural adjustments without reviewing the entire text. This update supports better compliance with evolving administrative standards as the Unitary Patent system matures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年4月1日起，新版统一专利指南正式生效实施", "全面修订指南内容，重点增强程序清晰度与法律依据细节", "欧洲专利局提供新旧版本对比文档，便于用户追踪具体变更"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Updated Unitary Patent Guidelines took effect on 1 April 2026, refining procedures and legal details within the UPC system.", "The EPO provides a marked-up comparison document highlighting changes between the 2025 and 2026 guideline versions.", "Amendments focus on enhancing procedural clarity and providing more detailed legal basis information for system users."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["研读EPO对比文档，精准掌握UPC程序合规新要求", "优化欧洲专利组合管理，规避因程序疏漏导致的维权风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced procedural clarity reduces uncertainty in Unitary Patent maintenance and UPC-related filings.", "Practice note: Review the EPO's marked-up comparison document to identify specific amendments affecting current applications or litigation.", "What to monitor: Further refinements to guidelines as the UPC continues to develop its case law and administrative practices."]
core_points_en: Updated Unitary Patent Guidelines took effect on 1 April 2026, refining procedures and legal details within the UPC system.
The EPO provides a marked-up comparison document highlighting changes between the 2025 and 2026 guideline versions.
Amendments focus on enhancing procedural clarity and providing more detailed legal basis information for system users.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced procedural clarity reduces uncertainty in Unitary Patent maintenance and UPC-related filings.
Practice note: Review the EPO's marked-up comparison document to identify specific amendments affecting current applications or litigation.
What to monitor: Further refinements to guidelines as the UPC continues to develop its case law and administrative practices.

items.title: Rapport annuel 2025
items.title_zh: 法国国家工业产权局 2025 年度报告
items.title_en: INPI 2025 Annual Report: Strategic Roadmap Launch and Key Filing Data
items.summary: Rapport annuel 2025 sgurtler@inpi.fr 31 mars 2026 L’année 2025 a été marquée par le lancement d’une nouvelle feuille de route stratégique pour l’INPI. Élément structurant pour l’Institut, le COP 2025-2029 fixe des ambitions fortes et s'inscrit dans la volonté d’apporter toujours plus de services répondant aux besoins des entrepreneurs et des innovateurs, pour contribuer à la croissance de la France. Découvrez dans ce rapport le bilan des premières actions engagées par l’Institut, tant en matière
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局（INPI）发布 2025 年度报告，标志着其 2025-2029 年战略规划合同（COP）的启动。报告总结了机构在企业手续与知识产权保护方面的首批行动成果，披露了单一窗口及专利、商标等申请的关键数据。报告强调通过支持创新者需求、提升无形资产价值来推动法国经济增长，展现了机构的韧性与服务能力。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) released its 2025 Annual Report, marking the commencement of its new strategic roadmap for 2025-2029. The report outlines the objectives of the Performance Contract (COP), emphasizing enhanced services for entrepreneurs and innovators to support French economic growth. It provides a comprehensive overview of INPI's activities, including key statistics from the Single Window platform and intellectual property filings such as patents, trademarks, and designs. The document highlights the institute's resilience and its commitment to supporting businesses through every stage of development, focusing on the valuation of intangible assets and innovation support both domestically and internationally.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注法国 IP 政策新动向，利用其强化的服务体系优化在法布局。建议参考报告数据评估市场热度，积极利用单一窗口机制提升确权效率，并重视无形资产运营以契合当地创新支持导向。
items.ai_insight_en: This report signals INPI's continued operational stability and strategic focus on user-centric services under its new multi-year contract. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the publication offers essential context regarding the institute's current priorities in processing efficiency and asset valorization. Monitoring these strategic directions helps stakeholders align their portfolio management expectations with the office's evolving service capabilities and international engagement efforts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["启动 2025-2029 战略规划合同，确立服务创新者新目标", "披露年度专利申请、商标注册及企业手续办理关键数据", "强调通过无形资产估值与支持创新助力法国经济增长"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Launch of the 2025-2029 Performance Contract establishing strong ambitions for service enhancement.", "Publication of key annual data regarding the Single Window and IP title deposits across all categories.", "Focus on supporting business development stages and valuing intangible assets to drive national growth."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注法国新政导向，优化在法知识产权战略布局", "利用单一窗口机制，提升确权效率与资产运营能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Understanding INPI's strategic priorities aids in anticipating service improvements and administrative workflows for French IP assets.", "Practice note: Reviewing the reported filing trends and Single Window metrics provides baseline data for assessing market activity and procedural efficiency.", "What to monitor: Future implementation details of the 2025-2029 COP may reveal specific changes in examination practices or digital service offerings."]
core_points_en: Launch of the 2025-2029 Performance Contract establishing strong ambitions for service enhancement.
Publication of key annual data regarding the Single Window and IP title deposits across all categories.
Focus on supporting business development stages and valuing intangible assets to drive national growth.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding INPI's strategic priorities aids in anticipating service improvements and administrative workflows for French IP assets.

items.title: Post-transaction Reselection Of A Payment Method: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 交易后重选支付方式被认定为非技术性特征
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Post-Transaction Payment Method Reselection Non-Technical
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method and system for reversing a payment method selection after a transaction has already been processed using a consolidated payment device associated...
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 技术上诉委员会在 T 1327/22 号案件中裁定，利用整合支付设备在交易完成后撤销原支付方式并启用新方式，本质上属于金融安排而非技术贡献。若权利要求未限定超出通用计算机系统的具体技术实现手段，仅定义此类非技术需求不足以确立创造性，该特征在 inventive step 评估中不予考虑。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1327/22, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.01 addressed a patent application for reversing payment method selection after transaction processing via a consolidated payment device. The Board determined that allowing users to cancel a first payment and authorize a second one constitutes a financial arrangement rather than a technical contribution. Consequently, this feature was excluded from the inventive step assessment. The ruling emphasizes that defining non-technical requirements without specifying technical implementation details beyond standard computer systems fails to establish inventiveness under European patent practice.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及金融科技或支付流程的软专利时，应避免仅描述商业逻辑。必须将方案锚定于具体的技术架构改进或数据处理流程，明确区别于通用计算机的标准功能，以符合 EPO 对技术性的严格要求，降低被驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the EPO's strict separation between business logic and technical character in software-related inventions. For rights holders in fintech and digital payments, merely automating commercial workflows or user preferences does not satisfy the requirement for a technical contribution. Applicants must anchor claims in specific data processing architectures or hardware interactions that solve technical problems, rather than relying on the economic benefits of flexible payment options.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["交易后退款并重充属金融安排，不构成技术贡献", "未限定具体技术实现的非技术需求无法确立创造性", "EPO 上诉委强调软件专利需具备实质技术实施手段"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Post-transaction reselection of payment methods is classified as a non-technical financial matter by the EPO Board.", "Claims lacking specific technical implementation details beyond generic computer systems cannot support inventive step.", "The invention allows refunding a first payment method while simultaneously authorizing a second method on a single device."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免纯商业逻辑描述，须锚定具体技术架构改进", "明确区分通用计算功能与特有技术实施手段"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Fintech applicants must distinguish technical implementations from pure financial rules to secure patentability in Europe.", "Practice note: Draft claims to highlight specific technical mechanisms for data handling or system architecture, avoiding broad business method descriptions.", "What to monitor: Future EPO decisions regarding consolidated payment devices and the boundary between administrative financial processes and technical solutions."]
core_points_en: Post-transaction reselection of payment methods is classified as a non-technical financial matter by the EPO Board.
Claims lacking specific technical implementation details beyond generic computer systems cannot support inventive step.
The invention allows refunding a first payment method while simultaneously authorizing a second method on a single device.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Fintech applicants must distinguish technical implementations from pure financial rules to secure patentability in Europe.
Practice note: Draft claims to highlight specific technical mechanisms for data handling or system architecture, avoiding broad business method descriptions.
What to monitor: Future EPO decisions regarding consolidated payment devices and the boundary between administrative financial processes and technical solutions.

items.title: Successful conclusion of second convergence of practice cycle
items.title_zh: EPO 成功完成第二轮专利审查实践趋同周期
items.title_en: EPO Adopts Common Practices on Broad Claims and Double Patenting
items.summary: The EPO has completed the second Convergence of Practice cycle with new common practices on Broad Claims and Double Patenting, strengthening alignment and legal certainty across the patent network.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布完成第二轮“实践趋同”计划，正式采纳关于“宽泛权利要求”和“重复专利”的共同实践准则。此举旨在统一欧洲专利网络内的审查标准，减少各国差异，提升法律确定性。新规则明确了过度宽泛权利要求的处理框架及重复专利异议的信息披露要求，为申请人提供更可预测的审查环境。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has concluded its second Convergence of Practice cycle, adopting new common practices regarding broad claims and double patenting. This initiative, a cornerstone of the EPO's Strategic Plan 2028, aims to harmonize examination standards across the European Patent Network, thereby enhancing legal certainty for users. Working Group 11 established a framework for identifying overly broad claims during the search phase, while Working Group 12 clarified the information requirements for double patenting objections. These measures seek to reduce procedural divergences among national offices and improve synergy between first and second filing procedures. The third work cycle is now underway, focusing on divisional applications and internet disclosures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请需关注审查标准趋同，避免因权利要求过宽或重复布局被驳回。建议提前研判新指南，优化撰写策略以适配统一审查口径，降低合规风险。
items.ai_insight_en: The adoption of these common practices signals a move toward greater procedural uniformity within the European Patent Network. For rights holders and applicants, this reduces the risk of unexpected divergences in examination outcomes across different contracting states. The clarified approach to broad claims and double patenting objections provides a more transparent basis for responding to office actions. As the EPO continues to drive alignment through its Strategic Plan 2028, monitoring the implementation of these practices by national offices will be essential for maintaining consistent portfolio management strategies across Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 采纳宽泛权利要求与重复专利两项共同实践准则", "新框架旨在统一审查标准，增强欧洲专利网络法律确定性", "第三轮工作已启动，聚焦分案申请与互联网披露议题"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New common practices on broad claims define frameworks for handling overly broad claims during the search phase.", "Double patenting guidelines clarify required examiner information for objections to ensure predictable outcomes.", "The third convergence cycle has commenced, addressing divisional applications and internet disclosure practices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注宽泛权利要求新界定，优化专利撰写以避免审查障碍", "利用趋同红利预判审查走向，提升在欧洲各国的获权效率"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty and reduced procedural divergences benefit applicants seeking protection across multiple EPC states.", "Practice note: Review claim drafting strategies against the new framework for overly broad claims to align with updated search phase expectations.", "What to monitor: Track national office updates on the Convergence Dashboard regarding the implementation of double patenting objection standards."]
core_points_en: New common practices on broad claims define frameworks for handling overly broad claims during the search phase.
Double patenting guidelines clarify required examiner information for objections to ensure predictable outcomes.
The third convergence cycle has commenced, addressing divisional applications and internet disclosure practices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced legal certainty and reduced procedural divergences benefit applicants seeking protection across multiple EPC states.
Practice note: Review claim drafting strategies against the new framework for overly broad claims to align with updated search phase expectations.
What to monitor: Track national office updates on the Convergence Dashboard regarding the implementation of double patenting objection standards.

items.title: Results of EQE paper F 2026 available
items.title_zh: 2026 年欧洲专利代理人资格考试 F 卷成绩公布
items.title_en: EPO Publishes 2026 EQE Paper F Results Amidst Modular Reform Transition
items.summary: Less than two weeks after the European Qualifying Examination (EQE) 2026 session concluded on 12 March 2026, the results of paper F have been distributed to around 650 candidates.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局公布 2026 年 EQE 基础卷（F 卷）成绩，约 650 名考生参试，通过率约 84%。作为考试模块化改革的关键一步，今年首次引入 M1/M2 卷并保留旧制试卷，标志着过渡期顺利完成。全数字化考试提升了效率，新架构旨在增强专利体系的包容性与可持续性，考生可按阶段评估能力并进阶。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has distributed results for the 2026 European Qualifying Examination (EQE) Paper F to approximately 650 candidates. The foundation paper, which assesses procedural patent law and claim analysis, achieved a pass rate of around 84%, with over 530 candidates succeeding. This release highlights the efficiency of the fully digital examination system introduced in 2021. The 2026 session marked a significant milestone as the final year legacy papers were offered alongside new modular components M1 and M2. This transitional phase supports the EPO's progressive structural reform aimed at enhancing quality, accessibility, and sustainability within the European patent profession.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局需关注代理人资质新规，模块化考试可能改变服务供给节奏。建议提前规划专利代理合作，利用早期模块评估潜在合作伙伴能力，确保在欧知识产权事务由具备最新资质的专业人士处理，以应对更严格的执业标准。
items.ai_insight_en: The progression toward a fully modular EQE structure alters the timeline for qualifying as a European patent attorney. For companies and firms relying on external counsel or building internal teams, understanding these phased competency assessments is crucial for talent acquisition and service provider evaluation. The early benchmarking capability allows for more structured career development paths for trainees, potentially impacting the availability of junior versus senior representatives in the market during the transition period.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["F 卷测试程序法与权利要求分析，超 530 人通过，体现数字化考试高效性", "年为旧制试卷最后一年，M1/M2 首考标志模块化改革过渡成功", "新架构允许考生分阶段参考，2027 年将全面实施全新模块化考试体系"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Paper F results show an 84% pass rate, reflecting foundational legal knowledge and analytical skills required for professional representation.", "The 2026 session was the last to offer legacy papers A through D, marking the successful completion of the EQE's transitional phase.", "New modules M1 and M2 were introduced this year, with M3 and M4 scheduled for implementation in 2027 to finalize the modular structure."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注考试改革对欧洲专利代理服务市场供给与专业分工的潜在影响", "建议依据新模块标准筛选代理人，确保其具备分阶段验证的专业能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Understanding the new modular qualification pathway helps in assessing the specific competencies and experience levels of potential patent attorneys.", "Practice note: Firms should align training programs with the new M1-M4 structure to ensure candidates progress efficiently through the reformed examination system.", "What to monitor: The implementation of M3 and M4 modules in 2027 will complete the transition, potentially affecting the supply of newly qualified representatives."]

items.title: CD Munich, March 24, 2026, Procedural Order, UPC_CFI_2296/2025
items.title_zh: UPC 慕尼黑裁定：初步异议范围穷尽且不含诉讼资格抗辩
items.title_en: UPC Munich: Rule 19.1 Preliminary Objections Exhaustive; Standing and Res Judicata Are Merits Issues
items.summary: The court confirmed, in line with the Court of Appeal’s decisions in Aylo v. DISH/SLING (UPC_CoA_188/2024) and Roku/Sun (UPC_CoA_288/2025)...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院慕尼黑中央分部作出程序令，确认规则 19.1 所列初步异议清单具有穷尽性，排除诉讼资格缺失或既判力等实体抗辩。法院指出此类问题需经事实评估，不属“明显”不可受理情形，应合并审理以提升程序效率，避免单独听证。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Central Division in Munich issued a procedural order confirming that the list of preliminary objections under Rule 19.1 RoP is exhaustive, limited strictly to jurisdiction, divisional competence, and language. The court rejected the defendant’s attempts to raise lack of standing and res judicata as preliminary objections, classifying them as substantive defences requiring merits assessment. Consequently, anticipatory orders under Rules 361 and 362 RoP were deemed inapplicable as these issues were not manifestly inadmissible. Prioritizing procedural economy, the court denied a separate hearing on admissibility, opting instead for a single combined hearing with the merits.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 应诉时，不宜将诉讼资格等实体问题作为初步异议提出，以免被驳回并浪费程序机会。应聚焦管辖权等法定异议点，并准备在实质审理阶段充分举证经济利益关联，以应对资格挑战。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the strict boundary between procedural admissibility and substantive validity at the UPC. Parties must ensure that preliminary objections align precisely with Rule 19.1 grounds to avoid dismissal. Arguments regarding standing based on corporate structures or prior national judgments should be prepared as part of the main defence strategy on the merits, rather than relying on early procedural dismissal mechanisms.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["规则 19.1 初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭能力及语言，不得扩展至实体抗辩", "诉讼资格与既判力涉及事实审查，不符合规则 361/362 条“明显”不可受理标准", "基于程序经济原则，法院拒绝就可受理性举行单独听证，主张合并审理"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 19.1 RoP preliminary objections are exhaustive and exclude substantive defences like lack of standing or res judicata.", "Lack of standing and res judicata require factual and legal assessment, preventing their treatment as manifestly inadmissible under Rules 361 and 362 RoP.", "Procedural efficiency dictates a single hearing combining admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["初步异议策略需严格限定于管辖权等法定事由，避免混同实体抗辩", "针对诉讼资格质疑，应提前梳理子公司股权链条及经济利益证据以备实质审理"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders and defendants must distinguish between procedural jurisdiction challenges and substantive standing arguments to avoid wasting preliminary objecti…", "Practice note: Prepare evidence regarding economic interest and corporate links for the merits phase, as standing disputes will not be resolved via anticipatory orders unless mani…", "What to monitor: Upcoming Court of Appeal rulings on res judicata, which may further refine how prior national decisions impact UPC nullity actions."]
core_points_en: Rule 19.1 RoP preliminary objections are exhaustive and exclude substantive defences like lack of standing or res judicata.
Lack of standing and res judicata require factual and legal assessment, preventing their treatment as manifestly inadmissible under Rules 361 and 362 RoP.
Procedural efficiency dictates a single hearing combining admissibility and merits rather than separate preliminary hearings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and defendants must distinguish between procedural jurisdiction challenges and substantive standing arguments to avoid wasting preliminary objecti…
Practice note: Prepare evidence regarding economic interest and corporate links for the merits phase, as standing disputes will not be resolved via anticipatory orders unless mani…
What to monitor: Upcoming Court of Appeal rulings on res judicata, which may further refine how prior national decisions impact UPC nullity actions.

items.title: UPC: Litigation Insurance Relevant to Security for Costs – Syntorr v Arthrex | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院：诉讼保险应纳入费用担保考量
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Litigation Insurance Must Be Considered for Security for Costs
items.summary: The UPC Court of Appeal holds that litigation insurance must be considered when deciding whether to order security for costs, overturning the Munich Local Division.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Syntorr 诉 Arthrex 案中推翻慕尼黑地方分院裁定，确立诉讼保险政策是决定是否命令提供费用担保时必须考虑的因素。法院指出，虽然规则未直接将保险列为担保形式，但在评估原告财务状况及被告成本回收风险时，必须将保险作为自由裁量的重要依据，修正了此前仅接受存款或银行担保的狭隘观点。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal overturned a Munich Local Division order requiring Syntorr to provide €2,000,000 in security for costs. The appellate court held that litigation insurance policies must be considered when exercising discretion under Article 69(4) UPCA and Rule 158.1 RoP. While the lower division ruled that insurance does not constitute valid security, the Court of Appeal clarified that such policies are relevant factors in assessing whether a claimant's financial position creates a legitimate concern regarding the recoverability of legal costs. The review standard is limited to errors in the exercise of judicial discretion.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧涉诉时应积极利用诉讼保险降低被责令高额现金担保的风险。需提前规划保险方案，将其作为应对对方费用担保申请的核心抗辩理由，优化资金流动性并提升诉讼防御能力。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the scope of judicial discretion regarding security for costs at the UPC. Rights holders and defendants must now account for litigation insurance coverage when assessing the risk of cost orders. It signals that financial assessments will look beyond liquid assets to include contractual risk transfer mechanisms, potentially lowering barriers for well-insured claimants while maintaining protection for defendants against unrecoverable costs.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉院认定诉讼保险是评估费用担保必要性的关键因素", "推翻慕尼黑分院拒绝将保险纳入考量的原审裁定", "明确法院在行使自由裁量权时需综合评估财务风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal established that litigation insurance is a mandatory factor when determining if security for costs should be granted.", "Rule 158.1 RoP allows courts discretion to order security via deposit or bank guarantee, but does not exclude insurance from financial assessment.", "Appellate review focuses on whether the lower court misused or exceeded its discretion in evaluating the claimant's ability to cover costs."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用诉讼保险抗辩高额费用担保请求，缓解资金压力", "提前布局保险策略，增强在 UPC 诉讼中的财务防御力"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Well-insured claimants may face reduced requirements for cash deposits or bank guarantees when opposing security for costs applications.", "Practice note: Legal teams should proactively disclose and analyze litigation insurance terms during preliminary cost security disputes to influence judicial discretion.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes adequate insurance coverage and how courts weigh policy limits against potential cost awards."]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal established that litigation insurance is a mandatory factor when determining if security for costs should be granted.
Rule 158.1 RoP allows courts discretion to order security via deposit or bank guarantee, but does not exclude insurance from financial assessment.
Appellate review focuses on whether the lower court misused or exceeded its discretion in evaluating the claimant's ability to cover costs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Well-insured claimants may face reduced requirements for cash deposits or bank guarantees when opposing security for costs applications.
Practice note: Legal teams should proactively disclose and analyze litigation insurance terms during preliminary cost security disputes to influence judicial discretion.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes adequate insurance coverage and how courts weigh policy limits against potential cost awards.

items.title: Wanneer wordt een bewegingsmerk geweigerd wegens technische functionaliteit?
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：纯技术功能动态商标将被驳回
items.title_en: EU General Court Refuses Motion Mark for Hinged Window Due to Technical Functionality
items.summary: In January 2026, the General Court of the EU refused the application for a motion mark of a hinged window. The General Court considers that the movement consists only of a technical functional process.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月，欧盟普通法院维持 EUIPO 决定，驳回德国 Kct 公司关于折叠窗开合动画的动态商标注册申请。法院认定该运动序列仅由技术功能过程组成，缺乏显著性且属于《欧盟商标条例》禁止注册的技术解决方案范畴，旨在防止通过商标权无限期垄断技术特征。
items.ai_summary_en: In January 2026, the General Court of the European Union upheld the refusal of a motion mark application filed by Kct GmbH & Co. The mark consisted of an animation depicting the opening and closing mechanism of a hinged window. The Court determined that the movement represented solely a technical functional process necessary to achieve a specific result. Consequently, the application was rejected under Article 7(1)(e)(ii) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation, which prohibits registration of signs consisting exclusively of characteristics required to obtain a technical result. This decision reinforces the principle that trademark law cannot be used to secure a perpetual monopoly on technical solutions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the boundary between protectable brand identity and unprotectable technical function for dynamic trademarks. Rights holders must ensure that motion marks include distinctive, non-functional visual elements beyond the mere depiction of a product's operational mechanics. Failure to distinguish aesthetic choices from technical necessities will likely lead to absolute grounds for refusal based on technical functionality.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["动态商标若仅展示产品技术运作过程，将被视为缺乏显著性", "欧盟法律禁止注册仅为获取技术结果所必需的形状或特征", "法院强调需区分功能性要素与装饰性要素以判定可注册性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The General Court confirmed that motion marks depicting purely technical processes are excluded from registration under EU trademark law.", "Article 7(1)(e)(ii) prevents trademark protection for features essential to achieving a technical result, safeguarding against monopolies on technical solutions.", "Registration is only possible if the sign contains non-functional elements, such as decorative or fanciful features, that play a significant role."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免申请仅描述产品技术运作流程的纯功能性动态商标", "在设计中增加非功能性装饰元素以提升商标显著特征"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Applicants seeking motion mark protection must integrate unique, non-functional visual elements to avoid rejection based on technical functionality.", "Practice note: Conduct a thorough assessment to separate essential technical features from decorative aspects when drafting motion mark specifications and representations.", "What to monitor: Future EUIPO and CJEU decisions regarding the threshold for 'non-functional' elements in dynamic and multimedia trademark applications."]
core_points_en: The General Court confirmed that motion marks depicting purely technical processes are excluded from registration under EU trademark law.
Article 7(1)(e)(ii) prevents trademark protection for features essential to achieving a technical result, safeguarding against monopolies on technical solutions.
Registration is only possible if the sign contains non-functional elements, such as decorative or fanciful features, that play a significant role.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Applicants seeking motion mark protection must integrate unique, non-functional visual elements to avoid rejection based on technical functionality.
Practice note: Conduct a thorough assessment to separate essential technical features from decorative aspects when drafting motion mark specifications and representations.
What to monitor: Future EUIPO and CJEU decisions regarding the threshold for 'non-functional' elements in dynamic and multimedia trademark applications.

items.title: 12 minutes with EPO President António Campinos
items.title_zh: EPO 主席坎皮诺斯谈欧洲竞争力与创新格局
items.title_en: EPO President Campinos: Patent Demand Hits Record, Single Market Fragmentation Persists
items.summary: European Patent Office (EPO) President António Campinos appeared on the Euronews programme “12 Minutes With” to discuss Europe’s competitiveness and innovation landscape. The interview was recorded shortly after the launch of the
items.ai_summary_zh: EPO 主席坎皮诺斯在访谈中指出，欧洲专利申请量首破 20 万，但在云计和 AI 领域面临挑战，需发力量子技术。他强调基础研究强劲但商业化转化不足，单一市场碎片化是主要障碍，并支持欧盟简化公司注册及统一规则以提升整体竞争力。
items.ai_summary_en: European Patent Office President António Campinos discussed Europe’s innovation landscape in an Euronews interview following the release of the EPO Technology Dashboard 2025. The data revealed that annual demand for European patents exceeded 200,000 for the first time. While acknowledging strong fundamental research and potential in quantum technology, Campinos highlighted significant challenges in cloud computing and artificial intelligence. He identified market fragmentation, including disparate national regulations and stock exchanges, as a major barrier to scaling innovative companies. The President supported the European Commission’s proposals to harmonize company registration rules, viewing this as essential for strengthening the single market and improving overall competitiveness.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The record patent filing volume underscores sustained R&D activity, yet the President’s emphasis on commercialization gaps highlights a structural disconnect between research output and market success. For rights holders and corporate counsel, the ongoing push for regulatory harmonization is strategically significant. Simplifying cross-border operations could reduce administrative friction for scaling startups and multinational entities, potentially altering the competitive dynamics for emerging technologies where Europe currently lags behind other global jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧洲专利申请年需求量首次突破二十万件大关", "云计与人工智能是短板，量子技术具竞争优势", "市场碎片化阻碍创新规模化，需 harmonise 规则"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Annual demand for European patents surpassed 200,000 for the first time, according to the EPO Technology Dashboard 2025.", "Europe faces critical challenges in cloud computing and AI, though it retains competitive potential in quantum technology.", "Market fragmentation and complex regulatory differences remain primary obstacles to scaling innovative enterprises."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["聚焦量子技术等欧洲优势领域进行差异化布局", "关注欧盟统一规则红利，优化在欧商业化路径"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor regulatory harmonization efforts to anticipate reduced administrative barriers for scaling pan-European operations.", "Practice note: Consider strategic portfolio adjustments in emerging fields like quantum technology where Europe maintains a comparative advantage.", "What to monitor: Track the implementation of simplified company registration rules proposed by the European Commission to enhance single market cohesion."]
core_points_en: Annual demand for European patents surpassed 200,000 for the first time, according to the EPO Technology Dashboard 2025.
Europe faces critical challenges in cloud computing and AI, though it retains competitive potential in quantum technology.
Market fragmentation and complex regulatory differences remain primary obstacles to scaling innovative enterprises.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor regulatory harmonization efforts to anticipate reduced administrative barriers for scaling pan-European operations.
Practice note: Consider strategic portfolio adjustments in emerging fields like quantum technology where Europe maintains a comparative advantage.
What to monitor: Track the implementation of simplified company registration rules proposed by the European Commission to enhance single market cohesion.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-412/24 Fauré Le Page
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：商标含虚构历史年份可能构成欺骗
items.title_en: CJEU: Trademark Number Evoking Fictitious Heritage May Deceive Consumers
items.summary: Luxury leather goods: the inclusion of a number in a trade mark, evoking a fictitious historical heritage, may be deceptive to consumers
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Fauré Le Page 案中裁定，若商标包含暗示遥远成立年份的数字，从而虚构长期传统与技艺，即便该数字本身不直接描述商品特性，也可能因赋予商品虚假的质量保证与声望形象而被视为具有欺骗性。法院强调，奢侈品质量涵盖其吸引力与声望，成员国法院需结合整体语境评估公众认知。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-412/24, the Court of Justice ruled that a trademark containing a number suggesting a distant year of establishment may be deceptive under EU law if it evokes long-standing know-how and prestige that do not reflect reality. The case concerned 'Fauré Le Page Paris 1717', filed by a company established in 2009, while the historic firm ceased trading in 1992. The Court held that such marks mislead consumers regarding the quality and prestige of luxury goods, as the perceived guarantee of tradition is a characteristic of the goods. National courts must assess whether the relevant public perceives the number as indicating genuine historical continuity.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧注册含历史年份或传统暗示的商标时，须确保事实依据真实，避免虚构传承故事。建议提前开展合规审查，防止因“声望误导”被宣告无效或面临侵权诉讼风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies that brand narratives implying historical continuity can constitute deception if factually unsupported, particularly in the luxury sector where prestige influences consumer choice. Rights holders must ensure that any temporal references in trademarks align with verifiable corporate history to avoid invalidity risks based on misleading nature under EU trademark law.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["商标中暗示遥远成立年份的数字可被视为对商品质量与声望的误导", "奢侈品的质量属性包含其吸引力与声望形象，不仅限于物理特性", "是否构成欺骗需由成员国法院结合具体语境及相关公众感知综合判定"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["A trademark including a number evoking fictitious historical heritage may deceive consumers regarding quality and prestige.", "Luxury goods quality encompasses attractiveness and prestigious image, not merely physical characteristics or origin.", "Deceptiveness depends on whether the relevant public perceives the mark as implying non-existent long-standing know-how."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["虚构品牌历史年份易被认定为欺骗，需确保时间标识有实证支撑", "奢侈品出海应审慎使用传统、传承等叙事，防范声望误导法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Brands using historical dates must verify factual accuracy to prevent findings of deception regarding quality and prestige.", "Practice note: Assess trademark distinctiveness and potential deceptiveness by evaluating public perception of implied heritage claims.", "What to monitor: How national courts apply this standard to other sectors where brand history influences perceived product value."]
core_points_en: A trademark including a number evoking fictitious historical heritage may deceive consumers regarding quality and prestige.
Luxury goods quality encompasses attractiveness and prestigious image, not merely physical characteristics or origin.
Deceptiveness depends on whether the relevant public perceives the mark as implying non-existent long-standing know-how.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands using historical dates must verify factual accuracy to prevent findings of deception regarding quality and prestige.
Practice note: Assess trademark distinctiveness and potential deceptiveness by evaluating public perception of implied heritage claims.
What to monitor: How national courts apply this standard to other sectors where brand history influences perceived product value.

items.title: The 'Prompter' as Copyright Author? Lessons from Munich
items.title_zh: 提示者即作者？慕尼黑法院关于 AI 生成物版权的判决启示
items.title_en: Munich Court Denies Copyright for AI-Generated Logos: Prompter Not Author
items.summary: For the first time, a German court has addressed the "Prompter's" claim to authorship in the output. The District Court of Munich (AG München, Judgment of Feb 13, 2026 – 142 C 9786/25) offers a foundational blueprint for determining when the human-machine prompt crosses the threshold of copyright protection when it comes to the output. The Case
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地方法院首次裁定，用户仅通过迭代提示词生成的 AI 图像不构成作品。法院认为，若提示词过于宽泛或仅做微调，实际创作决策由机器完成，无法体现人类个性。只有当提示词中的创意元素主导输出时，才受版权保护。
items.ai_summary_en: The District Court of Munich (AG München) dismissed a copyright infringement claim regarding three logos generated via text-to-image AI, ruling that the plaintiff's iterative prompting did not constitute authorship. The court held that copyright requires the output to reflect the author's personality through free creative decisions. It established that the AI must function as a mere tool rather than an independent creator. Protection arises only if creative elements in the prompt objectively define the output, dominating the machine's randomness. General instructions leaving design decisions to the algorithm fail the threshold for personal intellectual creation under German law.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧使用 AI 生成内容时，需保留详细创作日志，证明提示词对最终成果具有决定性控制。避免依赖简单指令，应深度介入参数调整与具体设计表达，以满足欧盟版权法对“人类智力创造”的严格要求。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance on the human-AI interaction threshold for copyright subsistence in Germany. It clarifies that extensive but general prompting does not automatically equate to authorship if the machine retains significant discretionary power over the final expression. Rights holders and legal teams should note that the court applies the CJEU's 'sufficient objectivity' standard upstream to the prompt itself. This reinforces the need for demonstrable human control over specific design elements rather than relying on broad artistic directions or post-generation selection.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["AI 须为工具而非独立创作者，人类需掌控核心设计决策", "宽泛指令与结果选择不足以构成个人智力创作", "提示词必须客观定义输出，排除机器随机性主导"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Copyright protection requires the work to reflect the author's personality via free creative decisions, not just triggering a process.", "The AI model must act as a mere tool; protection exists only if prompt creativity dominates the final output.", "Vague or open-ended instructions leave design decisions to the AI, failing the requirement for objectively defined intent."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["保留全流程提示记录以证明人类创意主导地位", "避免宽泛指令，需深度介入具体设计表达细节"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Generative AI outputs may lack copyright protection if prompts are too vague, impacting enforcement strategies for digital assets.", "Practice note: Document specific, objective design instructions within prompts to demonstrate dominant human creative intent over machine randomness.", "What to monitor: Future EU jurisprudence applying the 'mere tool' versus 'independent instrument' distinction to other generative AI use cases."]
core_points_en: Copyright protection requires the work to reflect the author's personality via free creative decisions, not just triggering a process.
The AI model must act as a mere tool; protection exists only if prompt creativity dominates the final output.
Vague or open-ended instructions leave design decisions to the AI, failing the requirement for objectively defined intent.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Generative AI outputs may lack copyright protection if prompts are too vague, impacting enforcement strategies for digital assets.
Practice note: Document specific, objective design instructions within prompts to demonstrate dominant human creative intent over machine randomness.
What to monitor: Future EU jurisprudence applying the 'mere tool' versus 'independent instrument' distinction to other generative AI use cases.

items.title: Düsseldorf LD, March 18, 2026, Decision On Infringement Action And Counterclaim For Revocation, UPC_CFI_135/2024, UPC_CFI_477/2024
items.title_zh: UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院就 Dolby 诉 Beko 案作出侵权与无效反诉判决
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Dominant Position in FRAND Context and Implementer's Willingness
items.summary: The Düsseldorf Local Division held that a dominant position within the meaning of Article 102 TFEU may arise if smart TVs complying with a common standard...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在 Dolby 诉 Beko 案中裁定，若符合标准的智能电视无许可无法上市，专利权人可能拥有市场支配地位。法院强调，若实施者未在 FRAND 谈判初期表明许可意愿，则无需审查专利权人报价是否合规。该判决遵循华为诉中兴案框架，并与曼海姆分院立场保持一致。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division ruled that a dominant position under Article 102 TFEU may exist if standard-compliant smart TVs cannot be marketed without a license for the patent in suit, given consumer expectations for common codecs. The Court held that if an implementer fails to indicate willingness to conclude a license during initial FRAND negotiations, the patentee’s offer need not be examined for FRAND compliance. This decision aligns with the Mannheim Local Division’s approach in Panasonic v Oppo regarding the Huawei v ZTE framework.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口智能电视等标准产品时，须在收到侵权通知后立即明确表达许可意愿，否则将丧失 FRAND 抗辩机会。建议提前建立标准化应对流程，避免因程序瑕疵导致败诉风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the threshold for establishing dominance in SEP cases involving consumer electronics and reinforces strict procedural requirements for implementers. Rights holders can rely on this to streamline enforcement against unresponsive parties, while implementers must ensure immediate, explicit responses to infringement notices to preserve FRAND defenses.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标准合规电视若无许可无法销售，专利权人或具市场支配地位", "实施者未表许可意愿时，无需审查专利权人报价是否符合 FRAND", "判决遵循华为诉中兴框架，确认 UPC 内部裁判标准一致性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Dominant position may arise where consumers expect standard-compliant devices to decode all common video codecs covered by the standard.", "If the infringer fails to indicate willingness to license in response to notice, the analysis of the patentee's FRAND offer ends.", "The Düsseldorf Local Division aligns its FRAND framework application with the Mannheim Local Division's precedent."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿以保留抗辩权", "出口企业应预判标准必要专利风险并制定前置谈判策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Implementers must respond promptly to infringement notices to avoid forfeiting FRAND defenses.", "Practice note: Patentees may cease detailed FRAND offer analysis if implementers show no initial willingness to negotiate.", "What to monitor: Consistency in FRAND application across UPC Local Divisions following this alignment with Mannheim precedents."]
core_points_en: Dominant position may arise where consumers expect standard-compliant devices to decode all common video codecs covered by the standard.
If the infringer fails to indicate willingness to license in response to notice, the analysis of the patentee's FRAND offer ends.
The Düsseldorf Local Division aligns its FRAND framework application with the Mannheim Local Division's precedent.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Implementers must respond promptly to infringement notices to avoid forfeiting FRAND defenses.
Practice note: Patentees may cease detailed FRAND offer analysis if implementers show no initial willingness to negotiate.
What to monitor: Consistency in FRAND application across UPC Local Divisions following this alignment with Mannheim precedents.

items.title: For Medical Devices, “Possible Use” Amounts To Infringement Only If The Use Is In Line With Medical Practice
items.title_zh: 医疗器械“可能使用”构成侵权须符合医疗实践
items.title_en: UPC Munich: Medical Device Infringement Requires Use Consistent With Medical Practice
items.summary: The UPC Munich Local Division (the LD Munich) has dismissed an infringement action relating to a medical device. It confirmed that a device can still infringe a patent, even if it is normally operated in a non-infringing way, as long as the patent-infringing use remains possible.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 慕尼黑分部驳回 Emboline 诉 AorticLab 专利侵权案。法院确认，即使设备通常以非侵权方式运行，只要侵权使用仍有可能，原则上可构成侵权。但针对医疗器械，法院引入关键限制：仅当该潜在用途符合专业实践及公认医学科学规则（即合乎医术）时，才认定为侵权。本案中被告设备若按专利方式移除将损坏组织，故不侵权。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Munich Local Division dismissed an infringement action concerning an embolic protection device, establishing that potential infringing use must align with professional medical practices to constitute infringement. While confirming that a device can infringe if infringing use remains possible despite normal non-infringing operation, the court introduced a 'lege artis' qualification for medical devices. The court found the defendant's device lacked the claimed graspable structure suitable for hook engagement without damaging the filter mesh. Consequently, the alleged infringing removal method was deemed neither intended nor suitable under recognized rules of medical science.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械出口企业应重视 UPC 判例，产品设计不仅要规避技术特征，还需论证替代用途不符合医疗常规。建议在欧洲专利申请及维权中，将“符合医疗实践”作为侵权比对的重要抗辩或主张依据，提升应对精度。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment introduces a significant limitation on the scope of infringement for medical devices within the UPC system. Rights holders must now demonstrate that alleged infringing uses are not only technically possible but also compliant with standard medical procedures. For defendants, this provides a robust defense avenue by arguing that specific claim features are incompatible with safe, standard clinical practice, thereby negating infringement even if technical overlap exists.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 确立医疗器械侵权需同时满足“技术可能性”与“医疗合规性”双重标准", "若潜在侵权用途违背医学常规或造成组织损伤，则不构成专利侵权行为", "本案因被告设备无法在不损坏情况下通过钩状结构移除，被判定未落入保护范围"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Potential patent infringement for medical devices requires the use to be consistent with professional medical practices and recognized scientific rules.", "A device does not infringe if the alleged infringing feature is unsuitable for its intended purpose without causing damage to the device or tissue.", "The UPC Munich Local Division dismissed the claim as the defendant's device lacked a graspable structure engageable by a hook as required by the patent."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口欧洲医械产品需评估潜在用途是否符合当地公认医疗操作规范", "利用“非合乎医术”抗辩策略，可有效阻断基于理论可能性的侵权指控"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Patent owners enforcing medical device patents in the UPC must assess whether alleged infringing uses align with standard clinical protocols and safety norms.", "Practice note: Defendants should evaluate whether the accused product's design makes the claimed infringing use medically impractical or unsafe, leveraging the 'lege artis' requir…", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions may adopt similar 'medical practice' qualifications, potentially influencing claim construction and infringement assessments across member st…"]
core_points_en: Potential patent infringement for medical devices requires the use to be consistent with professional medical practices and recognized scientific rules.
A device does not infringe if the alleged infringing feature is unsuitable for its intended purpose without causing damage to the device or tissue.
The UPC Munich Local Division dismissed the claim as the defendant's device lacked a graspable structure engageable by a hook as required by the patent.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent owners enforcing medical device patents in the UPC must assess whether alleged infringing uses align with standard clinical protocols and safety norms.
Practice note: Defendants should evaluate whether the accused product's design makes the claimed infringing use medically impractical or unsafe, leveraging the 'lege artis' requir…
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions may adopt similar 'medical practice' qualifications, potentially influencing claim construction and infringement assessments across member st…

items.title: Republic of Moldova to become 40th EPO member state
items.title_zh: 摩尔多瓦将成为欧洲专利组织第 40 个成员国
items.title_en: Republic of Moldova to Join European Patent Organisation as 40th Member State
items.summary: The Republic of Moldova will join the European Patent Organisation as its 40th member on 1 June 2026.
items.ai_summary_zh: 摩尔多瓦将于 2026 年 6 月 1 日正式成为欧洲专利组织第 40 个成员国。该国已于 2026 年 3 月交存加入书，完成加入《欧洲专利公约》最后步骤。此前双方通过验证协议合作多年，此举标志着摩尔多瓦知识产权框架进一步融入欧洲体系，也是其欧盟一体化进程的重要里程碑。
items.ai_summary_en: The Republic of Moldova is scheduled to become the 40th contracting state of the European Patent Organisation on 1 June 2026, following the deposit of its instrument of accession on 25 March 2026. This accession follows a long-standing cooperation framework, including a validation agreement effective since 2015 that allowed European patents to extend to Moldova without separate national filings. The move strengthens European patent cooperation and aligns with Moldova’s broader integration efforts following the opening of EU accession negotiations in June 2024.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利布局范围将扩大至摩尔多瓦。建议关注生效日期，利用单一申请程序覆盖该国市场，降低维权与申请成本，同时评估当地知识产权环境变化带来的新机遇。
items.ai_insight_en: The expansion of the European Patent Convention system to include Moldova broadens the geographic scope for unified patent protection strategies. Rights holders can now anticipate seamless coverage across 40 jurisdictions through the centralised EPO grant procedure. This development simplifies portfolio management for companies operating in Eastern Europe, reducing the administrative burden associated with validating patents in multiple national systems and enhancing legal certainty for innovation protection in the region.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["摩尔多瓦将于 2026 年 6 月正式成为欧专局第 40 个成员国", "该国已完成加入《欧洲专利公约》的所有法律程序步骤", "此举深化了欧洲专利合作并助推摩尔多瓦欧盟一体化进程"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Moldova will officially join the EPC as the 40th member state on 1 June 2026 after depositing its accession instrument.", "A validation agreement effective since 2015 previously enabled extending granted European patents to Moldovan territory.", "Accession marks a significant milestone in strengthening European patent cooperation and supporting Moldova's IP framework development."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧专体系扩容，中国企业可一站式获取摩尔多瓦专利保护", "需关注 2026 年 6 月生效节点，及时调整海外专利申请策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Portfolio owners gain streamlined access to patent protection in Moldova via the central EPO grant process, eliminating the need for separate national validation…", "Practice note: Update validation instructions and docketing systems to reflect Moldova's status as an EPC contracting state effective 1 June 2026 for pending and future applicatio…", "What to monitor: Observe any transitional provisions or specific national implementation measures by AGEPI regarding the shift from validation agreements to full EPC membership."]
core_points_en: Moldova will officially join the EPC as the 40th member state on 1 June 2026 after depositing its accession instrument.
A validation agreement effective since 2015 previously enabled extending granted European patents to Moldovan territory.
Accession marks a significant milestone in strengthening European patent cooperation and supporting Moldova's IP framework development.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Portfolio owners gain streamlined access to patent protection in Moldova via the central EPO grant process, eliminating the need for separate national validation…
Practice note: Update validation instructions and docketing systems to reflect Moldova's status as an EPC contracting state effective 1 June 2026 for pending and future applicatio…
What to monitor: Observe any transitional provisions or specific national implementation measures by AGEPI regarding the shift from validation agreements to full EPC membership.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-767/23 [Remling]
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：终审法院拒绝初步裁决必须详述理由
items.title_en: CJEU: National Courts of Last Instance Must Reason Refusals to Refer
items.summary: A national court or tribunal of last instance must always give reasons for its refusal to refer questions to the Court of Justice for a preliminary ruling
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Remling 案中裁定，成员国终审法院若拒绝向欧盟法院提请初步裁决，必须具体说明理由。即使国内法允许简易驳回上诉，法院仍需详细阐述为何符合无需裁决的三种例外情形（问题无关、已有判例或显而易见）。本案源于荷兰国务委员会处理摩洛哥公民居留许可案时未充分说明拒绝理由，法院强调此举对维护欧盟法律解释统一性至关重要。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-767/23 Remling, the Court of Justice ruled that national courts of last instance must always provide specific reasons when refusing to refer questions for a preliminary ruling. Even where domestic law permits summary dismissal of appeals, such courts must concretely explain why an exception to the obligation to refer applies: irrelevance, existing case law, or acte clair. The judgment addresses Dutch legislation allowing supreme courts to dismiss appeals with brief reasoning, emphasizing that procedural efficiency cannot override the fundamental duty to ensure uniform EU law interpretation. Lower court grounds may be adopted only if they clearly justify the refusal under these strict exceptions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces procedural safeguards for parties seeking clarification of EU law in final instances. It limits the ability of supreme courts to bypass referrals through summary decisions, ensuring transparency in the application of CILFIT criteria. For litigants, this provides a clearer basis to challenge refusals to refer, particularly in complex areas like immigration or trade where EU law interpretation is critical for consistent application across member states.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["终审法院拒绝初步裁决时必须具体说明适用例外的理由", "即便国内法允许简易裁判，也不能免除详述拒绝裁决理由的义务", "下级法院的理由可被采纳，但前提是其已清晰论证符合例外情形"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Courts of last instance must specifically state reasons for refusing preliminary references, regardless of domestic summary procedure rules.", "Refusals are valid only if the question is irrelevant, previously interpreted, or so obvious as to leave no reasonable doubt.", "Lower court reasoning may be adopted by supreme courts only if it explicitly justifies the refusal under established exceptions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用新规要求终审法院详述理由，增加案件转询欧盟法院几率", "在涉欧诉讼中强化程序抗辩，确保欧盟法律解释的统一适用"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties in final appeal stages can demand concrete justification for non-referral, enhancing procedural fairness and legal certainty.", "Practice note: Counsel should scrutinize lower court judgments for adequate CILFIT analysis, as supreme courts may adopt these grounds for refusal.", "What to monitor: National implementations of this ruling may affect how supreme courts draft summary dismissals in future EU law disputes."]
core_points_en: Courts of last instance must specifically state reasons for refusing preliminary references, regardless of domestic summary procedure rules.
Refusals are valid only if the question is irrelevant, previously interpreted, or so obvious as to leave no reasonable doubt.
Lower court reasoning may be adopted by supreme courts only if it explicitly justifies the refusal under established exceptions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties in final appeal stages can demand concrete justification for non-referral, enhancing procedural fairness and legal certainty.
Practice note: Counsel should scrutinize lower court judgments for adequate CILFIT analysis, as supreme courts may adopt these grounds for refusal.
What to monitor: National implementations of this ruling may affect how supreme courts draft summary dismissals in future EU law disputes.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-521/21 Rzecznik Praw Obywatelskich (Recusal of a judge of an ordinary court)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：法官任命瑕疵本身不足以认定其缺乏独立性
items.title_en: CJEU: Judicial Appointment Irregularities Alone Do Not Establish Lack of Independence
items.summary: Rule of law: an irregularity committed during the appointment of a judge is not in itself sufficient to find that that judge is not independent, since an overall assessment of all of the circumstances attending the appointment of that judge is necessary
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 C-521/21 号案件中裁定，法官任命过程中的不规则性本身不足以认定该法官缺乏独立性。法院强调需对任命背景进行整体评估，仅当瑕疵性质严重且共同导致外部干涉风险时，才构成回避理由。波兰司法改革引发的任命争议及救济缺失，单独或结合均不自动导致法官回避。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-521/21, the Court of Justice ruled that irregularities in a judge's appointment do not automatically render the judge non-independent. An overall assessment of all circumstances is required. The participation of Poland's reformed National Council of the Judiciary (KRS) and the lack of remedies for unsuccessful candidates are insufficient grounds for recusal alone. Recusal requires irregularities capable of creating a real risk of state interference or reasonable doubt regarding impartiality. National courts must review the lawfulness of appointments but cannot rely solely on structural reforms to disqualify judges without evidence of specific risks to independence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企涉诉时，利用波兰法官任命瑕疵申请回避的策略受限。需聚焦具体案件中的实质干涉证据，而非单纯依赖程序瑕疵，建议加强个案法律风险评估。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the threshold for challenging judicial independence in EU member states, particularly regarding systemic reforms. For litigants, it establishes that procedural defects in appointment mechanisms, such as those involving Poland's KRS, are insufficient for recusal without demonstrating specific risks of external interference. Parties seeking disqualification must focus on concrete evidence of compromised impartiality rather than relying solely on general arguments about institutional independence.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["任命瑕疵需整体评估，非自动导致法官缺乏独立性", "仅严重瑕疵致外部干涉风险时，方质疑法庭合法性", "波兰司法改革背景下的任命参与不足以免除法官履职"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Irregularities in judicial appointment procedures require an overall assessment of circumstances rather than automatic findings of non-independence.", "Participation of the reformed Polish KRS and lack of remedies for candidates do not individually justify judge recusal under EU law.", "Recusal requires irregularities creating a real risk of state interference or reasonable doubt regarding the judge's impartiality."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请法官回避需证明实质干涉风险，非仅凭程序瑕疵", "在波诉讼应强化个案独立性证据收集与法律论证"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Litigants in Poland and similar jurisdictions must provide specific evidence of interference risks to successfully challenge judicial independence.", "Practice note: Legal arguments for recusal should focus on the gravity and nature of specific irregularities affecting the individual judge's impartiality.", "What to monitor: Future CJEU applications of this 'overall assessment' standard to other member states undergoing judicial system reforms."]
core_points_en: Irregularities in judicial appointment procedures require an overall assessment of circumstances rather than automatic findings of non-independence.
Participation of the reformed Polish KRS and lack of remedies for candidates do not individually justify judge recusal under EU law.
Recusal requires irregularities creating a real risk of state interference or reasonable doubt regarding the judge's impartiality.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Litigants in Poland and similar jurisdictions must provide specific evidence of interference risks to successfully challenge judicial independence.
Practice note: Legal arguments for recusal should focus on the gravity and nature of specific irregularities affecting the individual judge's impartiality.
What to monitor: Future CJEU applications of this 'overall assessment' standard to other member states undergoing judicial system reforms.

items.title: Selective Presentation Of Content Of Varying Complexity: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 基于消费速率调整内容复杂度被认定为非技术特征
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Content Complexity Adaptation Non-Technical Under Comvik Approach
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method for selecting online content to present to users based on their content consumption behavior on a social media platform.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会在 T 1207/22 号案件中裁定，根据用户内容消费速率动态调整展示内容复杂度的方法属于非技术目标。尽管消费速率可客观测量，但该逻辑本身可由非技术人员构想，不具备技术性。不过，案件因涉及临时内容与静态内容处理的技术实现细节被发回重审。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1207/22, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.01 assessed a method for selecting online content based on user consumption behavior. The Board held that adapting content complexity according to a user's content consumption rate constitutes a non-technical aim under the Comvik approach, as the underlying concept could be conceived by a non-technical person. Although the consumption rate is objectively measured via user inputs and elapsed time, this does not automatically confer technical character. However, the Board remitted the case for further examination regarding features distinguishing ephemeral from static content for rate calculation, noting these may involve non-obvious technical implementation considerations requiring further search and assessment.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请社交算法类专利时，应避免仅强调商业逻辑或用户体验优化。需深入挖掘底层数据处理、缓存机制等具体技术实现细节，以证明存在超越常规编程的技术贡献，规避被驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the strict application of the Comvik two-piece test to social media algorithms and user interface adaptations. Rights holders must distinguish between business-driven user experience optimizations and genuine technical solutions. While measuring user interaction speed is technical in execution, using that data to drive content selection logic is often viewed as administrative or psychological. Claims focusing solely on the adaptive presentation strategy face high rejection risks unless supported by specific, non-obvious technical processing steps.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["依据 Comvik 原则，适配内容复杂度属非技术目的", "即使基于客观数据，核心逻辑仍缺乏技术贡献", "临时内容处理的技术实现需进一步审查与检索"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Adapting content complexity based on consumption rate is a non-technical aim under Comvik, even with objective measurement.", "The core logic of adjusting presentation difficulty can be conceived by a non-technical person without technical contribution.", "Distinguishing ephemeral from static content for rate calculation involves potential technical implementation details warranting further examination."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["算法专利需聚焦底层技术实现而非业务逻辑", "区分临时与静态内容的处理可作为技术突破口"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Algorithms optimizing user engagement through content adaptation face significant hurdles in establishing inventive step at the EPO.", "Practice note: Draft claims to emphasize specific technical data handling, caching mechanisms, or system architecture rather than the adaptive presentation logic itself.", "What to monitor: Further examination outcomes regarding the technical distinctiveness of ephemeral versus static content processing implementations."]
core_points_en: Adapting content complexity based on consumption rate is a non-technical aim under Comvik, even with objective measurement.
The core logic of adjusting presentation difficulty can be conceived by a non-technical person without technical contribution.
Distinguishing ephemeral from static content for rate calculation involves potential technical implementation details warranting further examination.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Algorithms optimizing user engagement through content adaptation face significant hurdles in establishing inventive step at the EPO.
Practice note: Draft claims to emphasize specific technical data handling, caching mechanisms, or system architecture rather than the adaptive presentation logic itself.
What to monitor: Further examination outcomes regarding the technical distinctiveness of ephemeral versus static content processing implementations.

items.title: Information
items.title_zh: 2025 年司法统计：高活跃度伴随审理周期缩短
items.title_en: CJEU 2025 Statistics: Record Case Closures and Reduced Proceedings Duration
items.summary: Judicial statistics 2025: a very high level of activity accompanied by a reduction in the length of proceedings
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院与普通法院发布 2025 年司法统计数据。尽管部分初步裁决管辖权转移，案件总量仍创新高。两院结案数达 1898 件，积压案件降至 18 年来最低。平均审理周期显著缩短，其中普通法院仅需 16 个月。意大利和波兰提交的初步裁决请求数量显著，显示成员国司法互动频繁。
items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union released its 2025 judicial statistics, revealing a significant increase in judicial activity alongside improved procedural efficiency. The two courts closed a record 1,898 cases, while the backlog of pending cases dropped to its lowest level in 18 years. Average proceedings duration decreased for both institutions, with the General Court reducing its average time to 16 months. Italy and Poland submitted a notable volume of requests for preliminary rulings, reflecting sustained engagement from these Member States despite the transfer of certain jurisdictional responsibilities.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The reduction in average proceedings duration and the decline in case backlogs indicate enhanced procedural efficiency within the EU judicial system. For rights holders and litigants, this trend suggests potentially faster resolution times for intellectual property disputes and preliminary ruling references. The high volume of referrals from specific Member States highlights active national judicial engagement with EU law, which may influence the development of harmonized legal standards relevant to cross-border commercial operations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["两院结案总数创历史新高，积压案件量降至十八年最低点", "案件平均审理周期缩短，普通法院效率提升至十六个月", "意大利与波兰成为初步裁决请求的主要来源成员国"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Justice and General Court closed 1,898 cases in 2025, marking the highest annual closure rate in the institution's history.", "Pending cases declined to 2,489, representing the lowest backlog level recorded in eighteen years across both EU courts.", "Average proceedings duration shortened significantly, with the General Court achieving an average of 16 months compared to 18.5 months previously."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["审理周期缩短利于企业快速解决争端并降低时间成本", "关注意波两国高频诉讼动态以提前布局合规与风控"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Shorter average proceedings durations may reduce the temporal uncertainty associated with ongoing litigation and preliminary ruling references.", "Practice note: Monitor the evolving case management practices of the General Court, which achieved record closures while lowering its pending caseload.", "What to monitor: Track the nature and volume of preliminary ruling requests originating from Italy and Poland to anticipate emerging interpretative trends."]
core_points_en: The Court of Justice and General Court closed 1,898 cases in 2025, marking the highest annual closure rate in the institution's history.
Pending cases declined to 2,489, representing the lowest backlog level recorded in eighteen years across both EU courts.
Average proceedings duration shortened significantly, with the General Court achieving an average of 16 months compared to 18.5 months previously.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Shorter average proceedings durations may reduce the temporal uncertainty associated with ongoing litigation and preliminary ruling references.
Practice note: Monitor the evolving case management practices of the General Court, which achieved record closures while lowering its pending caseload.
What to monitor: Track the nature and volume of preliminary ruling requests originating from Italy and Poland to anticipate emerging interpretative trends.
